mantra:dhanteras:dhanvantari-kshama-prar:
Avahanam Na Janami Na Janami Visarjanam|
Puja-Karma Na Janami Kshamasva Parameshwara||
Maya Yat-Pujitam Deva! Paripurnam Tadastu Me||
Aparadha-Sahasrani Kriyanteaharnisham Maya|
Dasoahamiti Maam Matva Kshamasva Parameshwara|
Vidhehi Deva! Kalyanam Vidhehi Vipulam Shriyam|
Rupam Dehi, Jayam Dehi, Yasho Dehi, Dwisho Jahi||
Yasya Smritya Cha Namoktya Tapo-Yagya-Kriyadishu|
Nyunam Sampurnatam Yati Sadyo Vande Tamachyutam||
Anena Yatha-Militopachara-Dravyaih Krita-Pujanena Shri Dhanvantari-Devah Priyatam|
||Shri Dhanvantari-Devarpanamastu||
mantra:dhanteras:shri-kubera-dhyana-mant:
manuja-bāhya-vimāna-sthitam,
garuḍa-ratna-nibhaṃ nidhi-nāyakam|

kośaṃ varddhaya nityaṃ tvaṃ pari-rakṣa sureśvara||

Avahayami Deva! Tvamihayahi Kripam Kuru|
Kosham Varddhaya Nityam Tvam Pari-Raksha Sureshwara||
|| Shri Kuber-Devam Avahayami ||

oṃ śrīkuberāya namaḥ gandhākṣatān samarpayāmi|

oṃ śrīkuberāya namaḥ dīpaṃ darśayāmi|
oṃ śrīkuberāya namaḥ naivedyaṃ nivedayāmi|
oṃ śrīkuberāya namaḥ ācamanīyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkuberāya namaḥ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Padayoh Padyam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Shirasi Arghyam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Gandhakshatan Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Pushpam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Dhupam Aghrapayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Dipam Darshayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Naivedyam Nivedayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Achamaniyam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Tambulam Samarpayami|
mantra:dhanteras:shri-kubera-puja-samarp:
oṃ śrīkuberāya namaḥ|
anena pūjanena śrīdhanādhyakṣaḥ śrīkuberaḥ prīyatām|
namo namaḥ|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namha|
Anena Pujanena Shri Dhanadhyakshah Shri Kuberah Priyatam|
Namo Namah|

mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-dhoop-sam:
Vanaspati-Rasodbhuto Gandhadhyah Sumanoharah|
Aghreyah Sarva-Devanam, Dhupoayam Prati-Grihyatam||
||Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Dhoopam Samarpayami||
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-deep-sama:
Deepam Grihana Devesha! Trailokya-Timirapaham|
Bhaktya Deepam Prayachchhami Devaya Paramatmane|
Trahi Maam Nirayad Ghoraddipoayam Prati-Grihyatam||
||Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Deepam Samarpayami||
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-naivedya-:
Sharkara-Khanda-Khadyani Dadhi-Kshira-Ghritani Cha|
Aharo Bhakshya-Bhojyam Cha Naivedyam Prati-Grihyatam|
||Yathamshatah Shri Dhanvantari-Devaya Naivedyam Samarpayami-
Om Pranaya Swaha| Om Apanaya Swaha| Om Vyanaya Swaha|
Om Udanaya Swaha| Om Samanaya Swaha||
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-achamana-:
Tatah Paniyam Samarpayami Iti Uttaraposhanam|
Hasta-Prakshalanam Samarpayami| Mukha-Prakshalanam|
Karodvartanarthe Chandanam Samarpayami|
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-tambula-s:
Poogi-Phalam Maha-Divyam Naga-Valli-Dalairyutam|
Karpuraila-Samayuktam Tambulam Prati-Grihyatam||
||Shri Dhanvantari Devaya Mukha-Vasartham Poogi-Phala-Yuktam Tambulam Samarpayami||
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-dakshina-:
Hiranya-Garbha-Garbhastham Hema-Vijam Vibhavasoh|
Ananta-Punya-Phaladamatah Shantim Prayachchha Me||
||Shri Dhanvantari Devaya Suvarna-Pushpa-Dakshinam Samarpayami||
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-pradakshi:
Yani Kani Cha Papani Janmantara-Kritani Cha|
Tani Tani Vinashyanti Pradakshinam Pade Pade||
Tasmat Karunya-Bhavena Kshamasva Parameshwara||
||Shri Dhanvantari Devaya Pradakshinam Samarpayami||
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-vandana-s:
Kara-Kritam Va Kayajam Karmajam Va, Shravana-Nayanajam Va Manasam Vaaparadham|
||Shri Dhanvantari Devatayai Mantra-Pushpam Samarpayami||
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-sashtanga:
Namah Sarva-Hitarthaya Jagadadhara-Hetave|
Sashtangoayam Prayatnena Maya Kritah||
Namoastvanantaya Sahasra-Murtaye Sahasra-Padakshi-Shiroru-Bahave|
mantra:diwali:shri-dhanvantari-kshama-pr:
Avahanam Na Janami Na Janami Visarjanam|
Puja-Karma Na Janami Kshamasva Parameshwara||
Maya Yat-Pujitam Deva! Paripurnam Tadastu Me||
Aparadha-Sahasrani Kriyanteaharnisham Maya|
Dasoahamiti Maam Matva Kshamasva Parameshwara|
Vidhehi Deva! Kalyanam Vidhehi Vipulam Shriyam|
Rupam Dehi, Jayam Dehi, Yasho Dehi, Dwisho Jahi||
Yasya Smritya Cha Namoktya Tapo-Yagya-Kriyadishu|
Nyunam Sampurnatam Yati Sadyo Vande Tamachyutam||
Anena Yatha-Militopachara-Dravyaih Krita-Pujanena Shri Dhanvantari-Devah Priyatam|
||Shri Dhanvantari-Devarpanamastu||
mantra:diwali:shri-kali-dhyana-mantra:
oṃ sadyaśchinnaśiraḥ kṛpāṇamabhayaṃ hastairvaraṃ bibhratīṃ|
ghorāsyāṃ śirasāṃ srajaṃ surucirāṃ unmuktakeśāvalim||
sṛkkāsṛkpravahāṃ śmaśānanilayāṃ śrutyoḥ śavālaṅkṛtiṃ|
śyāmāṅgīṃ kṛta-mekhalāṃ śava-karairdevīṃ bhaje kālikām||
mantra:diwali:shri-kali-avahana-mantra:
oṃ deveśi! bhakti sulabhe! parivārasaminvate!
yāvat tvāṃ pūjayiṣyāmi tavāt tvaṃ susthirā bhava||
duṣpāre ghora-saṃsāra-sāgare patitaṃ sadā|
trāyasva varade devi! namaste cit-parātmike||
ye devā yāśca devyaśca calitāyāṃ calanti hi|
āvāhayāmi tān sarvān kālike parameśvari||
prāṇān rakṣa yaśo rakṣa rakṣa dārān sutān dhanam|
sarva-rakṣā-karī yasmāt tvaṃ hi devi jaganmaye||
praviśya tiṣṭha yajñe'smin yāvat pūjāṃ karomyaham|
sarvānanda-kare devi! sarvasiddhiṃ prayaccha me||
tiṣṭhātra kālike mātaḥ! sarva-kalyāṇa-hetave|
pūjāṃ gṛhāṇa sumukhi! namaste śaṅkara-priye||
|| śrīmahā-kālī-devīm āvāhayāmi||
mantra:diwali:shri-kali-pushpanjali-asan:
nānā-ratna-samāyuktaṃ kārtasvara-vibhūṣitam|
āsanaṃ devi deveśi! prītyarthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
|| śrīmahā-kālī-daivyai āsanārthe pañca-puṣpāṇi samarpayāmi||
mantra:diwali:shri-kali-navopachara-puja:
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ pādayoḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ śirasi arghyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ gandhākṣatān samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ puṣpaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ dhūpam āghrāpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ dīpaṃ darśayāmi|
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ naivedyaṃ nivedayāmi|
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ ācamanīyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi|
mantra:diwali:shri-kali-puja-samarpana-m:
oṃ śrīmahākālyai namaḥ|
anena pūjanena śrīkālī devī prīyatām|
namo namaḥ|
mantra:diwali:deep-malika-dhyana-mantra:
bho dīpa! brahmarūpastvaṃ hyandhakāra-vināśakaḥ|
gṛhāṇa mayā kṛtāṃ pūjām ojastejaḥ pravardhaya||
mantra:diwali:deep-malika-prarthana-mant:
śubhaṃ karotu kalyāṇamārogyaṃ sukha-sampadam|
mama buddhi-prakāśaṃ ca dīpa-jyotirnamo'stu te||
śubhaṃ bhavatu kalyāṇamārogyaṃ puṣṭi-vardhanam|
ātma-tattva-prabodhāya dīpa-jyotirnamo'stu te||
dīpāvalirmayā dattā gṛhāṇa tvaṃ sureśvari!
anena dīpa-dānena jñāna-dṛṣṭi-pradā bhava||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-dhyana-and-avaha:
sarvamaṅgalamāṅgalye śive sarvārthasādhike|
śaraṇye tryambake gauri nārāyaṇi namo'stu te||
brahmarūpe sadānande paramānandasvarūpiṇi|
drutasiddhiprade devi nārāyaṇi namo'stu te||
śaraṇāgatadīnārtaparitrāṇaparāyaṇe|
sarvasyārttihare devi nārāyaṇi namo'stu te||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ durgādevīm āvāhayāmi||

Sarvamangalamangalye Shive Sarvarthasadhike|
Sharanye Tryambake Gauri Narayani Namoastu Te||
Brahmarupe Sadanande Paramanandasvarupini|
Drutasiddhiprade Devi Narayani Namoastu Te||
Sharanagatadinartaparitranaparayane|
Sarvasyarttihare Devi Narayani Namoastu Te||
Durgadevim Avahayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-asana-mantra:
anekaratnasaṃyuktaṃ nānāmaṇigaṇānvitam|
kārtasvaramayaṃ divyamāsanaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ āsanaṃ kalpayāmi||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-asana-mantra-tra:
Anekaratnasamyuktam Nanamanigananvitam|
Kartasvaramayam Divyamasanam Pratigrihyatam||
Asanam Kalpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-padya-prakshalan:
gaṅgādisarvatīrthebhyo mayā prārthanayāhṛtam|
toyametatsukhasparśaṃ pādyārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi||

Gangadisarvatirthebhyo Maya Prarthanayahritam|
Toyametatsukhasparsham Padyartham Pratigrihyatam||
Padyam Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-arghya-samarpana:
gandhapuṣpākṣatairyuktamarghyaṃ sampāditaṃ mayā|
gṛhāṇa tvaṃ mahādevi prasannā bhava sarvadā||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ arghyaṃ samarpayāmi||

Gandhapushpakshatairyuktamarghyam Sampaditam Maya|
Grihana Tvam Mahadevi Prasanna Bhava Sarvada||
Arghyam Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-achamana-samarpa:
ācamyatāṃ tvayā devi bhaktiṃ me hyacalāṃ kuru|
īpsitaṃ me varaṃ dehi paratra ca parāṃ gatim||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ ācamanīyaṃ jalaṃ samarpayāmi||

Achamyatam Tvaya Devi Bhaktim Me Hyachalam Kuru|
Ipsitam Me Varam Dehi Paratra Cha Param Gatim||
Achamaniyam Jalam Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-snana-mantra:
payodadhi ghṛtaṃ kṣīraṃ sitayā ca samanvitam|
pañcāmṛtamanenādya kuru snānaṃ dayānidhe||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ snānīyaṃ jalaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-snana-mantra-tra:
Payodadhi Ghritam Kshiram Sitaya Cha Samanvitam|
Panchamritamanenadya Kuru Snanam Dayanidhe||
Snaniyam Jalam Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-vastra-samarpana:
vastraṃ ca somadaivatyaṃ lajjāyāstu nivāraṇam|
mayā niveditaṃ bhaktyā gṛhāṇa parameśvari||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ vastraṃ samarpayāmi||

Vastram Cha Somadaivatyam Lajjayastu Nivaranam|
Maya Niveditam Bhaktya Grihana Parameshwari||
Vastram Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-abhushana-samarp:
hārakaṅkaṇakeyūra-mekhalākuṇḍalādibhiḥ|
ratnāḍhyaṃ kuṇḍalopetaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ ābhūṣaṇaṃ samarpayāmi||

Harakankanakeyura-Mekhalakundaladibhih|
Ratnadhyam Kundalopetam Bhushanam Pratigrihyatam||
Abhushanam Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-chandana-samarpa:
paramānandasaubhāgyaṃ paripūrṇaṃ digantare|
gṛhāṇa paramaṃ gandhaṃ kṛpayā parameśvari||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ candanaṃ vilepayāmi||

Paramanandasaubhagyam Paripurnam Digantare|
Grihana Paramam Gandham Kripaya Parameshwari||
Chandanam Vilepayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-kumkuma-samarpan:
kuṅkumaṃ kāntidaṃ divyaṃ kāminīkāmasambhavam|
kuṅkumenārcite devi prasīda parameśvari||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ kuṅkumaṃ samarpayāmi||

Kumkumam Kantidam Divyam Kaminikamasambhavam|
Kumkumenarchite Devi Prasida Parameshwari||
Kumkumam Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-kajjala-samarpan:
kajjalaṃ kajjalaṃ ramyaṃ subhage śāntikārike|
karpūrajyotirutpannaṃ gṛhāṇa parameśvari||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ kajjalaṃ samarpayāmi||

Kajjalam Kajjalam Ramyam Subhage Shantikarike|
Karpurajyotirutpannam Grihana Parameshwari||
Kajjalam Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-saubhagya-sutra-:
saubhāgyasūtraṃ varade suvarṇamaṇisaṃyute|
kaṇṭhe badhnāmi deveśi saubhāgyaṃ dehi me sadā||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ saubhāgyasūtraṃ badhnāmi||

Saubhagyasutram Varade Suvarnamanisamyute|
Kanthe Badhnami Deveshi Saubhagyam Dehi Me Sada||
Saubhagyasutram Badhnami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-sugandhita-dravy:
candanāgarukarpūraiḥ saṃyutaṃ kuṅkumaṃ tathā|
kastūryādisugandhāśca sarvāṅgeṣu vilepanam||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ sugandhitadravyaṃ vilepayāmi||

Chandanagarukarpuraih Samyutam Kunkumam Tatha|
Kasturyadisugandhashcha Sarvangeshu Vilepanam||
Sugandhitadravyam Vilepayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-haridra-samarpan:
haridrārañjite devi sukhasaubhāgyadāyinī|
tasmāttvāṃ pūjayāmyatra sukhaśāntiṃ prayaccha me||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ haridrācūrṇaṃ samarpayāmi||

Haridraranjite Devi Sukhasaubhagyadayini|
Tasmattvam Pujayamyatra Sukhashantim Prayaccha Me||
Haridrachurnam Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-akshata-samarpan:
rañjitāḥ kuṅkumaudyena na akṣatāścātiśobhanāḥ|
mamaiṣāṃ devi dānena prasannā bhava śobhane||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ akṣatān samarpayāmi||

Ranjitah Kunkumaudyena Na Akshatashchatishobhanah|
Mamaisham Devi Danena Prasanna Bhava Shobhane||
Akshatan Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-pushpanjali-mant:
mandārapārijātādi-pāṭalīketakāni ca|
jātīcampakapuṣpāṇi gṛhāṇemāni śobhane||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ puṣpāñjaliṃ samarpayāmi||

Mandaraparijatadi-Pataliketakani Cha|
Jatichampakapushpani Grihanemani Shobhane||
Pushpanjalim Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-bilvapatra-mantr:
amṛtodbhava-śrīvṛkṣo mahādevi! priyaḥ sadā|
bilvapatraṃ prayacchāmi pavitraṃ te sureśvari||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ bilvapatrāṇi samarpayāmi||

Amritodbhava-Shrivriksho Mahadevi! Priyah Sada|
Bilvapatram Prayacchami Pavitram Te Sureshwari||
Bilvapatrani Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-dhupa-samarpana-:
daśāṅgaguggulaṃ dhūpaṃ candanāgarusaṃyutam|
samarpitaṃ mayā bhaktyā mahādevi! pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ dhūpamāghrāpayami|

Dashangaguggulam Dhupam Chandanagarusamyutam|
Samarpitam Maya Bhaktya Mahadevi! Pratigrihyatam||
Dhupamaghrapayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-dipa-samarpana-m:
ghṛtavarttisamāyuktaṃ mahātejo mahojjvalam|
dīpaṃ dāsyāmi deveśi! suprītā bhava sarvadā||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ dīpaṃ darśayāmi|

Ghritavarttisamayuktam Mahatejo Mahojjvalam|
Dipam Dasyami Deveshi! Suprita Bhava Sarvada||
Dipam Darshayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-naivedya-samarpa:
annaṃ caturvidhaṃ svādu rasaiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ samanvitam|
naivedyaṃ gṛhyatāṃ devi! bhaktiṃ me hyacalāṃ kuru||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ naivedyaṃ nivedayāmi|

Annam Chaturvidham Svadu Rasaih Shadbhih Samanvitam|
Naivedyam Grihyatam Devi! Bhaktim Me Hyachalam Kuru||
Naivedyam Nivedayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-rituphala-mantra:
drākṣākharjūrakadalī-phalasāmrakapitthakam|
nārikelekṣujambvādi-phalāni pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ ṛtuphalāni samarpayāmi||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-achamana-mantra:
kāmārivallabhe devi kurvācamanamambike|
nirantaramahaṃ vande caraṇau tava caṇḍike||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ ācamanīyaṃ jalaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-achamana-mantra-:
Kamarivallabhe Devi Kurvachamanamambike|
Nirantaramaham Vande Charanau Tava Chandike||
Achamaniyam Jalam Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-narikela-samarpa:
nārikelaṃ ca nāraṅgīṃ kaliṅgamañjiraṃ tvayā|
urvārukaṃ ca deveśi phalānyetāni gṛhyatām||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ nārikelaṃ samarpayāmi||

Narikelam Cha Narangim Kalingamanjiram Tvaya|
Urvarukam Cha Deveshi Phalanyetani Grihyatam||
Narikelam Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-tambula-samarpan:
elālavaṅgaṃ kastūrī karpūraiḥ puṣpavāsitām|
vīṭikāṃ mukhavāsārthaṃ samarpayāmi sureśvari||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi||

Elalavangam Kasturi Karpuraih Pushpavasitam|
Vitikam Mukhavasartham Samarpayami Sureshwari||
Tambulam Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-dakshina-mantra:
pūjāphalasamṛddhayarthaṃ tavāgre svarṇamīśvarī|
sthāpitaṃ tena me prītā pūrṇān kuru manoratham||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ dakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-dakshina-mantra-:
Pujaphalasamriddhayartham Tavagre Svarnamishwari|
Sthapitam Tena Me Prita Purnan Kuru Manoratham||
Dakshinam Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-pustaka-puja-man:
namo devyai mahādevyai śivāyai satataṃ namaḥ|
namaḥ prakṛtyai bhadrāyai niyatāḥ praṇatāḥ smatām||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ pustakaṃ pūjayāmi||

Namo Devyai Mahadevyai Shivayai Satatam Namah|
Namah Prakrityai Bhadrayai Niyatah Pranatah Smatam||
Pustakam Pujayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-dipa-pujana-mant:
śubhaṃ bhavatu kalyāṇamārogyaṃ puṣṭivarddhanam|
ātmatattvaprabodhāya dīpajyotirnamo'stu te||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ dīpaṃ pūjayāmi||

Shubham Bhavatu Kalyanamarogyam Pushtivardhanam|
Atmatattvaprabodhaya Dipajyotirnamoastu Te||
Dipam Pujayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-kanya-pujana-man:
sarvasvarūpe! sarveśe sarvaśakti svarūpiṇī|
pūjāṃ gṛhāṇa kaumāri! jaganmātarnamo'stu te||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ kanyāṃ pūjayāmi||

Sarvasvarupe! Sarveshe Sarvashakti Svarupini|
Pujam Grihana Kaumari! Jaganmatarnamoastu Te||
Kanyam Pujayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-nirajana-mantra:
nīrājanaṃ sumāṅgalyaṃ karpūreṇa samanvitam|
candrārkavahnisadṛśaṃ mahādevi! namo'stu te||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ karpūranīrājanaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-nirajana-mantra-:
Nirajanam Sumangalyam Karpurena Samanvitam|
Chandrarkavahnisadrisham Mahadevi! Namoastu Te||
Karpuranirajanam Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-pradakshina-mant:
pradakṣiṇaṃ trayaṃ devi prayatnena prakalpitam|
paśyādya pāvane devi ambikāyai namo'stu te||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ pradakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi||

Pradakshinam Trayam Devi Prayatnena Prakalpitam|
Pashyadya Pavane Devi Ambikayai Namoastu Te||
Pradakshinam Samarpayami||
mantra:durga:shri-durga-kshamarpana-mant:
aparādhaśataṃ devi matkṛtaṃ ca dine dine|
kṣamyatāṃ pāvane devi deveśi namo'stu te||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ aparādhān kṣamasva||

Aparadhashatam Devi Matkritam Cha Dine Dine|
Kshamyatam Pavane Devi Deveshi Namoastu Te||
Aparadhan Kshamaswa||
mantra:durga:durga-homa-sankalpa: bhūloke dharma sthāpanārtham sarveṣām janānām sukha śānti siddhyartham durgā homakarma yathāśakti kariṣye
mantra:durga:durga-homa-prajapati-ahuti: oṃ prajāpataye svāhā, idam prajāpataye na mama|
mantra:durga:durga-homa-indra-ahuti: oṃ indrāya svāhā, idam indrayai na mama|
mantra:durga:durga-homa-agni-ahuti: oṃ agnaye svāhā, idaṃ agnaye na mama|
mantra:durga:durga-homa-soma-ahuti: oṃ somāya svāhā, idaṃ somāya na mama|
mantra:durga:durga-homa-durga-ahuti-mant: oṃ śrīṃ hrīṃ duṃ durgāyai namaḥ svāhā|
oṃ durgāyai durgapārāyai sārāyai sarvakāriṇyai| khyātyai tathaiva kṛṣṇāyai dhūmrā satataṃ namaḥ|| svāhā|
mantra:durga:durga-homa-purnahuti-mantra: oṃ hrīṃ duṃ durgāyai namaḥ svāhā|
mantra:durga:durga-homa-dhyana-shloka:
siṃhasthā śaśiśekharā marakataprakhyayaiścaturbhirbhūyai|
śaṅkhaṃ cakradhanuḥśarāṃścara dadhatī netraistribhiḥ śobhitā|
āmuktāṅgadahārakaṅkaṇaraṇatkāñcīraṇannūpurā|
durgā durgatihāriṇī bhavatu no rat‍‌nollasatkuṇḍalā||
mantra:durga:navarna-mantra-chamunda-bee: oṃ aiṃ hrīṃ klīṃ cāmuṇḍāyai vicce
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:ganesha-chaturth:
he heramba! tvamehyehi hyambikātryambakātmaja|
siddhibuddhipate tryakṣa lakṣalābhapituḥ pitaḥ||
nāgāsyaṃ nāgahāraṃ tvāṃ gaṇarājaṃ caturbhujam|
bhūṣitaṃ svāyudhairdivyaiḥ pāśāṅkuśaparasvadhaiḥ||

asyai prāṇāḥ pratiṣṭhantu asyai prāṇā kṣarantu ca|
asyai devatvamarcāyai māmaheti ca kaścana||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
supratiṣṭho varado bhava||

vicitraratnakhacitaṃ divyāstaraṇasaṃyutam|
svarṇasiṃhāsanaṃ cāru gṛhāṇa guhāgraja||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
āsanaṃ samarpayāmi||

oṃ sarvatīrthasamudbhūtaṃ pādyaṃ gandhādibhiryutam|
gajānana gṛhāṇedaṃ bhagavān bhaktavatsalaḥ||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
pādayoḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi||

oṃ gaṇādhyakṣa namaste'stu gṛhāṇa karuṇākara|
arghyaṃ ca phalasaṃyuktaṃ gandhamālyākṣatairyutam||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
hastayorarghyaṃ samarpayāmi||

vighnarāja namastubhyaṃ tridaśairabhivandita|
gaṅgodakena deveśa kuruṣvācamanaṃ prabho||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
mukhe ācamanīyaṃ samarpayāmi||

mandākinyāstu yadvāri sarvapāpaharaṃ śubham|
tadidaṃ kalpitaṃ deva snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
sarvāṅgasnānaṃ samarpayāmi||

pañcāmṛtaṃ mayā''nītaṃ payo dadhi ghṛtaṃ madhu|
śarkarā ca samāyuktaṃ snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
pañcāmṛta-snānaṃ samarpayāmi||

kāmadhenusamudbhūtaṃ sarveṣāṃ jīvanaṃ param|
tejaḥ puṣṭikaraṃ divyaṃ snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
payaḥ-snānaṃ samarpayāmi||

payasastu samudbhūtaṃ madhurāmlaṃ śaśiprabham|
dadhyānītaṃ mayā deva snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
dadhi-snānaṃ samarpayāmi||

navanīta-samutpannaṃ sarvasaṃtoṣakārakam|
ghṛtaṃ tubhyaṃ pradāsyāmi snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
ghṛta-snānaṃ samarpayāmi||

puṣpareṇusamudbhūtaṃ susvādu madhuraṃ madhu|
tejaḥ puṣṭikaraṃ divyaṃ snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
madhu-snānaṃ samarpayāmi||

ikṣurasasamudbhūtāṃ śarkarāṃ puṣṭidāṃ śubhām|
malāpahārikāṃ divyāṃ snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
śarkarā-snānaṃ samarpayāmi||

campākāśekabakula-mālatī-mogarādibhiḥ|
vāsitaṃ snigdhatāheturtailaṃ cāru pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
suvāsita-snānaṃ samarpayāmi||

gaṅgā ca yamunā caiva godāvarī sarasvatī|
narmadā-sindhu-kāverī snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
śuddhodaka-snānaṃ samarpayāmi||

śītavātoṣṇasantrāṇaṃ lajjāyā rakṣaṇaṃ param|
dehālaṅkaraṇaṃ vastramataḥ śāntiṃ prayaccha me||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
vastraṃ samarpayāmi||

uttarīyaṃ tathā deva nānācitritamuttamam|
gṛhāṇedaṃ mayā bhaktyā dattaṃ tat saphalīkuru||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
uttarīyaṃ samarpayāmi||

navabhistantubhiryuktaṃ triguṇaṃ devatāmayam|
upavītaṃ mayā dattaṃ gṛhāṇa parameśvara||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
yajñopavītaṃ samarpayāmi||

śrīkhaṇḍaṃ candanaṃ divyaṃ gandhāḍhyaṃ sumanoharam|
vilepaṇaṃ suraśreṣṭha candanaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
gandhaṃ samarpayāmi||

akṣatāśca suraśreṣṭha kuṅkumāktāḥ suśobhitāḥ|
mayā niveditā bhaktyā gṛhāṇa parameśvara||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
akṣatān samarpayāmi||

mālyādīni sugandhīni mālyatyādīni vai prabho|
mayāhṛtāni puṣpāṇi gṛhyantāṃ pūjanāya bhoḥ||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
puṣpamālāṃ samarpayāmi||

tvatpriyāṇi supuṣpāṇi komalāni śubhāni vai|
śamīdalāni heramba gṛhāṇa gaṇanāyaka||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
śamī-patrāṇi samarpayāmi||

dūrvāṅkurān suharitānamṛtān maṅgalapradān|
ānītāṃstava pūjārthaṃ gṛhāṇa gaṇanāyaka||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
dūrvāṅkurān samarpayāmi||

sindūraṃ śobhanaṃ raktaṃ saubhāgyaṃ sukhavardhanam|
śubhadaṃ kāmadaṃ caiva sindūraṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
sindūraṃ samarpayāmi||

vanaspatirasodbhūto gandhāḍhyo gandha uttamaḥ|
āghreyaḥ sarvadevānāṃ dhūpo'yaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
dhūpamāghrāpayāmi||

sājyaṃ trivartisaṃyuktaṃ vahninā yojitaṃ mayā|
dīpaṃ gṛhāṇa deveśa trailokyatimirāpaham||
bhaktyā dīpaṃ prayacchāmi devāya paramātmane|
trāhi māṃ narakādghorāddīpajyotirnamo'stute||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
dīpaṃ darśayāmi||

naivedyaṃ gṛhyatāṃ deva bhaktiṃ me hyacalāṃ kuru|
īpsitaṃ me varaṃ dehi paratra ca parāṃ gatim||
śarkarā-khaṇḍa-khādyāni dadhi-kṣīra-ghṛtāni ca|
āhāraṃ bhakṣyabhojyaṃ ca naivedyaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
naivedyaṃ modakamayaṛtuphalāni ca samarpayāmi||

candanaṃ malayodbhūtaṃ kastūryādi-samanvitam|
karodvartanakaṃ deva gṛhāṇa parameśvara||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
candanena karodvartanaṃ samarpayāmi||

oṃ pūgīphalaṃ mahaddivyaṃ nāgavallīdalairyutam|
elācūrṇādisaṃyuktaṃ tāmbūlaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
mukha-vāsārtham-elā-pūgī-phalādi-sahitaṃ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi||

idaṃ phalaṃ mayā deva sthāpitaṃ puratastava|
tena me saphalāvāptirbhavejjanmani janmani||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
nārikela-phalaṃ samarpayāmi||

hiraṇyagarbhagarbhasthaṃ hemabījaṃ vibhāvasoḥ|
anantapuṇyaphaladamataḥ śāntiṃ prayaccha me||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
dravya-dakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi||

kadalīgarbhasambhūtaṃ karpūraṃ tu pradīpitam|
ārārtikyamahaṃ kurve paśya me varado bhava||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
karpūra-nīrājanaṃ samarpayāmi||

nānāsugandhi-puṣpāṇi yathā kālodbhavāni ca|
puṣpāñjaliṃ mayā dattāṃ gṛhāṇa parameśvara||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
mantra-puṣpāñjaliṃ samarpayāmi||

yāni kāni ca pāpāni jñātājñātakṛtāni ca|
tāni sarvāṇi naśyanti pradakṣiṇāṃ pade pade||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
pradakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi||

āvāhanaṃ na jānāmi na jānāmi tavārcanam|
pūjāṃ caiva na jānāmi kṣamasva gaṇeśvara||
anyathā śaraṇaṃ nāsti tvameva śaraṇaṃ mama|
tasmātkāruṇyabhāvena rakṣasva vighneśvara||
gataṃ pāpaṃ gataṃ duḥkhaṃ gataṃ dāridryameva ca|
āgatā sukhasampattiḥ puṇyācca tava darśanāt||
mantrahīnaṃ kriyāhīnaṃ bhaktihīnaṃ sureśvara|
yatpūjitaṃ mayā deva paripūrṇaṃ tadastu me||
yadakṣarapadabhraṣṭaṃ mātrāhīnaṃ ca yadbhavet|
tatsarvaṃ kṣamyatāṃ deva prasīda parameśvara||
mantra:ganesh-chaturthi:mushikavahana-sl:
mūṣikavāhana modakahasta
cāmarakarṇa vilambitasūtra |
vāmanarūpa mahesvaraputra
vighnavināyaka pāda namaste ||
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-pushpanjali-a:
Nanaratna-Samayuktam Karta-Svara-Vibhushitam|
Asanam Deva Devesha! Prityartham Pratigrihyatam||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Asanarthe Pancha-Pushpani Samarpayami||
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-padya-mantra:
Bhaktya Samarpitam Deva GanaPate! Namoastu Te||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Padyam Samarpayami||
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-arghya-mantra:
Namaste Sarvanagendra Namaste Purushottama|
Gandha-Pushpakshatairyuktam Phala-Dravya-Samanvitam||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Arghyam Samarpayami||
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-chandan-samar:
Shrikhandam Chandanam Divyam Gandhadhyam Sumanoharam|
Vilepanam Ganapate! Chandanam Pratigrihyatam||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Chandanam Samarpayami||
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-dhupa-samarpa:
Vanaspati-Rasodbhuto Gandhadhyah Sumanoharah|
Aghreyah Sarva-Devanam Dhupoayam Pratigrihyatam||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Dhupam Aghrapayami||
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-dipa-samarpan:
Dipam Grihana Devesha! Trailokya-Timirapaham|
Bhaktya Dipam Prayachchhami Devaya Paramatmane|
Trahi Mam Narakat Ghoraddipoayam Pratigrihyatam||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Dipam Darshayami||
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-naivedya-sama:
Sharkara-Khanda-Khadyani Dadhi-Kshira-Ghritani Cha|
Aharo Bhakshya-Bhojyam Cha Naivedyam Pratigrihyatam|
|| Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Yathamshatah Shriganesha-Devaya Naivedyam Samarpayami -
Om Pranaya Swaha|
Om Apanaya Swaha|
Om Samanaya Swaha|
Om Udanaya Swaha|
Om Vyanaya Swaha||
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-achamana-sama:
Tatah Paniyam Samarpayami Iti Uttaraposhanam|
Hasta-Prakshalanam Samarpayami| Mukha-Prakshalanam|
Karodvartanarthe Chandanam Samarpayami|
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-tambula-samar:
Pugiphalam Mahaddivyam Nagavallidalairyutam|
Karpurailasamayuktam Tambulam Pratigrihyatam||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Mukha-Vasartham Pugiphala-Yuktam Tambulam Samarpayami||
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-dakshina-mant:
Hiranyagarbha-Garbhastham Hemabijam Vibhavasoh|
Anantapunya-Phaladamatah Shantim Prayachchha Me||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Suvarna-Pushpa-Dakshinam Samarpayami||
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-pradakshina-m:
Yani Kani Cha Papani Janmantara-Kritani Cha|
Tani Tani Vinashyanti Pradakshinam Pade Pade||
Tasmat Karunya-Bhavena Kshamasva Parameshwara||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Pradakshinam Samarpayami||
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-vandana-sahit:
Shravana-Nayanajam Va Manasam Vaaparadham|
Jaya Jaya Karunabdhe Shri Ganapate! Trahi|
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Mantra-Pushpam Samarpayami||
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-sashtanga-pra:
Namah Sarva-Hitarthaya Jagadadhara-Hetave|
Sashtangoayam Supranamah Prayatnena Maya Kritah||
Namoastvanantaya Sahasra-Murtaye Sahasra-Padakshi-Shiroru-Bahave|
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Sashtanga-Pranamam Samarpayami||
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-kshama-prarth:
Avahanam Na Janami Na Janami Visarjanam|
Pujakarma Na Janami Kshamasva Parameshwara||
Maya Yatpujitam Deva! Paripurnam Tadastu Me||
Aparadhasahasrani Kriyanteaharnisham Maya|
Dasoayamiti Mam Matva Kshamasva Parameshwara|
Vidhehi Deva! Kalyanam Vidhehi Vipulam Shriyam|
Rupam Dehi Jayam Dehi Yasho Dehi Dwisho Jahi||
Yasya Smritya Cha Namoktya Tapo-Yajna-Kriyadishu|
Nunam Sampurnatam Yati Sadyo Vande Tamachyutam||
Anena Yatha-Militopachara-Dravyaih Krita-Pujanena Shriganesha-Devah Priyatam|
||Shriganesha-Devarpanamastu||
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganesha-raksha-mantra:
Bhaktanamabhayam Kartta! Trata Bhava Bhavarnavat|
||Anena Pujanena Shriganeshah Riddhi-Siddhi-Sahitah Priyatam, Namo Namah||
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganapati-avahana-mant: Ihagachchha, Iha Tishtha, Mama Pujam Grihana|
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganapati-prana-pratis:
Tano Tvarishtam Yajna Samimam Dadhatu|
Vishve-Deva Sa Iha Madayantam Om Pratishtha|
mantra:ganesh:shri-ganapati-dashopachara:
Om Ganapataye Namah Padayoh Padyam Samarpayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Shirasi Arghyam Samarpayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Gandhakshatam Samarpayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Pushpam Samarpayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Dhupam Ghrapayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Dipam Darshayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Naivedyam Samarpayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Achamaniyam Samarpayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Tambulam Samarpayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Dakshinam Samarpayami|
mantra:ganesh:ganesha-visarjan-sloka-mus:
mūṣikavāhana modakahasta
cāmarakarṇa vilambitasūtra |

mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-av:
he heramba! tvamehyehi hyambikātryambakātmaja|
siddhibuddhipate tryakṣa lakṣalābhapituḥ pitaḥ||
nāgāsyaṃ nāgahāraṃ tvāṃ gaṇarājaṃ caturbhujam|
bhūṣitaṃ svāyudhairdivyaiḥ pāśāṅkuśaparasvadhaiḥ||
He Heramba Tvamehyehi Hyambikatryambakatmaja|
Siddhibuddhipate Tryaksha Lakshalabhapituh Pitah||
Nagasyam Nagaharam Tvam Ganarajam Chaturbhujam|
Bhushitam Svayudhairdivyaih Pashankushaparashvadhaih||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-pr:
asyai prāṇāḥ pratiṣṭhantu asyai prāṇā kṣarantu ca|
asyai devatvamarcāyai māmaheti ca kaścana||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
supratiṣṭho varado bhava||
Asyai Pranah Pratishthantu Asyai Prana Ksharantu Cha|
Asyai Devatvamarchayai Mamaheti Cha Kashchana||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Supratishtho Varado Bhava||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-as:
vicitraratnakhacitaṃ divyāstaraṇasaṃyutam|
svarṇasiṃhāsanaṃ cāru gṛhāṇa guhāgraja||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
āsanaṃ samarpayāmi||
Vichitraratnakhachitam Divyastaranasamyutam|
Swarnasimhasanam Charu Grihana Guhagraja||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Asanam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-pa:
oṃ sarvatīrthasamudbhūtaṃ pādyaṃ gandhādibhiryutam|
gajānana gṛhāṇedaṃ bhagavān bhaktavatsalaḥ||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
pādayoḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi||
Om Sarvatirthasamudbhutam Padyam Gandhadibhiryutam|
Gajanana Grihanedam Bhagawan Bhaktavatsalah||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Padayoh Padyam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-ar:
oṃ gaṇādhyakṣa namaste'stu gṛhāṇa karuṇākara|
arghyaṃ ca phalasaṃyuktaṃ gandhamālyākṣatairyutam||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
hastayorarghyaṃ samarpayāmi||
Om Ganadhyaksha Namasteastu Grihana Karunakara|
Arghyam Cha Phalasamyuktam Gandhamalyakshatairyutam||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Hastayorarghyam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-ac:
vighnarāja namastubhyaṃ tridaśairabhivandita|
gaṅgodakena deveśa kuruṣvācamanaṃ prabho||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
mukhe ācamanīyaṃ samarpayāmi||
Vighnaraja Namastubhyam Tridashairabhivandita|
Gangodakena Devesha Kurushwachamanam Prabho||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Mukhe Achamaniyam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-sn:
mandākinyāstu yadvāri sarvapāpaharaṃ śubham|
tadidaṃ kalpitaṃ deva snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
sarvāṅgasnānaṃ samarpayāmi||
Mandakinyastu Yadvari Sarvapapaharam Shubham|
Tadidam Kalpitam Deva Snanartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Sarvanga-Snanam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-pa:
pañcāmṛtaṃ mayā''nītaṃ payo dadhi ghṛtaṃ madhu|
śarkarā ca samāyuktaṃ snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
pañcāmṛta-snānaṃ samarpayāmi||
Panchamritam Mayaanitam Payo Dadhi Ghritam Madhu|
Sharkara Cha Samayuktam Snanartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Panchamrita-Snanam Samarpayami||

kāmadhenusamudbhūtaṃ sarveṣāṃ jīvanaṃ param|
tejaḥ puṣṭikaraṃ divyaṃ snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
payaḥ-snānaṃ samarpayāmi||
Kamadhenusamudbhutam Sarvesham Jivanam Param|
Tejah Pushtikaram Divyam Snanartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Payah-Snanam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-da:
payasastu samudbhūtaṃ madhurāmlaṃ śaśiprabham|
dadhyānītaṃ mayā deva snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
dadhi-snānaṃ samarpayāmi||
Payasastu Samudbhutam Madhuramlam Shashiprabham|
Dadhyanitam Maya Deva Snanartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Dadhi-Snanam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-gh:
navanīta-samutpannaṃ sarvasaṃtoṣakārakam|
ghṛtaṃ tubhyaṃ pradāsyāmi snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
ghṛta-snānaṃ samarpayāmi||
Navanita-Samutpannam Sarvasantoshakarakam|
Ghritam Tubhyam Pradasyami Snanartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Ghrita-Snanam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-ma:
puṣpareṇusamudbhūtaṃ susvādu madhuraṃ madhu|
tejaḥ puṣṭikaraṃ divyaṃ snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
madhu-snānaṃ samarpayāmi||
Pushparenusamudbhutam Suswadu Madhuram Madhu|
Tejah Pushtikaram Divyam Snanartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Madhu-Snanam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-sh:
ikṣurasasamudbhūtāṃ śarkarāṃ puṣṭidāṃ śubhām|
malāpahārikāṃ divyāṃ snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
śarkarā-snānaṃ samarpayāmi||
Ikshurasasamudbhutam Sharkaram Pushtidam Shubham|
Malapaharikam Divyam Snanartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Sharkara-Snanam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-su:
campākāśekabakula-mālatī-mogarādibhiḥ|
vāsitaṃ snigdhatāheturtailaṃ cāru pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
suvāsita-snānaṃ samarpayāmi||
Champakashekabakula-Malati-Mogaradibhih|
Vasitam Snigdhataheturtailam Charu Pratigrihyatam||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Suvasita-Snanam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-sh:
gaṅgā ca yamunā caiva godāvarī sarasvatī|
narmadā-sindhu-kāverī snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
śuddhodaka-snānaṃ samarpayāmi||
Ganga Cha Yamuna Chaiva Godavari Saraswati|
Narmada-Sindhu-Kaveri Snanartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Shuddhodaka-Snanam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-va:
śītavātoṣṇasantrāṇaṃ lajjāyā rakṣaṇaṃ param|
dehālaṅkaraṇaṃ vastramataḥ śāntiṃ prayaccha me||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
vastraṃ samarpayāmi||
Shitavatoshnasantranam Lajjaya Rakshanam Param|
Dehalankaranam Vastramatah Shantim Prayachchha Me||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Vastram Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-ut:
uttarīyaṃ tathā deva nānācitritamuttamam|
gṛhāṇedaṃ mayā bhaktyā dattaṃ tat saphalīkuru||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
uttarīyaṃ samarpayāmi||
Uttariyam Tatha Deva Nanachitritamuttamam|
Grihanedam Maya Bhaktya Dattam Tat Saphalikuru||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Uttariyam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-ya:
navabhistantubhiryuktaṃ triguṇaṃ devatāmayam|
upavītaṃ mayā dattaṃ gṛhāṇa parameśvara||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
yajñopavītaṃ samarpayāmi||
Navabhistantubhiryuktam Trigunam Devatamayam|
Upavitam Maya Dattam Grihana Parameshwara||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Yajnopavitam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-ga:
śrīkhaṇḍaṃ candanaṃ divyaṃ gandhāḍhyaṃ sumanoharam|
vilepaṇaṃ suraśreṣṭha candanaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
gandhaṃ samarpayāmi||
Shrikhandam Chandanam Divyam Gandhadhyam Sumanoharam|
Vilepanam Surashreshtha Chandanam Pratigrihyatam||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Gandham Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-ak:
akṣatāśca suraśreṣṭha kuṅkumāktāḥ suśobhitāḥ|
mayā niveditā bhaktyā gṛhāṇa parameśvara||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
akṣatān samarpayāmi||
Akshatashcha Surashreshtha Kumkumaktah Sushobhitah|
Maya Nivedita Bhaktya Grihana Parameshwara||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Akshatan Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-pu:
mālyādīni sugandhīni mālyatyādīni vai prabho|
mayāhṛtāni puṣpāṇi gṛhyantāṃ pūjanāya bhoḥ||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
puṣpamālāṃ samarpayāmi||
Malyadini Sugandhini Malyatyadini Vai Prabho|
Mayahritani Pushpani Grihyantam Pujanaya Bhoh||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Pushpamalam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-sh:
tvatpriyāṇi supuṣpāṇi komalāni śubhāni vai|
śamīdalāni heramba gṛhāṇa gaṇanāyaka||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
śamī-patrāṇi samarpayāmi||
Tvatpriyani Supushpani Komalani Shubhani Vai|
Shamidalani Heramba Grihana Gananayaka||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Shami-Patrani Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-du:
dūrvāṅkurān suharitānamṛtān maṅgalapradān|
ānītāṃstava pūjārthaṃ gṛhāṇa gaṇanāyaka||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
dūrvāṅkurān samarpayāmi||
Durvankuran Suharitanamritan Mangalapradan|
Anitanstava Pujartham Grihana Gananayaka||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Durvankuran Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-si:
sindūraṃ śobhanaṃ raktaṃ saubhāgyaṃ sukhavardhanam|
śubhadaṃ kāmadaṃ caiva sindūraṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
sindūraṃ samarpayāmi||
Sinduram Shobhanam Raktam Saubhagyam Sukhavardhanam|
Shubhadam Kamadam Chaiva Sinduram Pratigrihyatam||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Sinduram Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-dh:
vanaspatirasodbhūto gandhāḍhyo gandha uttamaḥ|
āghreyaḥ sarvadevānāṃ dhūpo'yaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
dhūpamāghrāpayāmi||
Vanaspatirasodbhuto Gandhadhyo Gandha Uttamah|
Aghreyah Sarvadevanam Dhupoayam Pratigrihyatam||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Dhupamaghrapayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-di:
sājyaṃ trivartisaṃyuktaṃ vahninā yojitaṃ mayā|
dīpaṃ gṛhāṇa deveśa trailokyatimirāpaham||
bhaktyā dīpaṃ prayacchāmi devāya paramātmane|
trāhi māṃ narakādghorāddīpajyotirnamo'stute||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
dīpaṃ darśayāmi||
Sajyam Trivartisamyuktam Vahnina Yojitam Maya|
Dipam Grihana Devesha Trailokyatimirapaham||
Bhaktya Dipam Prayachchhami Devaya Paramatmane|
Trahi Mam Narakadghoraddipajyotirnamoastute||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Dipam Darshayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-na:
naivedyaṃ gṛhyatāṃ deva bhaktiṃ me hyacalāṃ kuru|
īpsitaṃ me varaṃ dehi paratra ca parāṃ gatim||
śarkarā-khaṇḍa-khādyāni dadhi-kṣīra-ghṛtāni ca|
āhāraṃ bhakṣyabhojyaṃ ca naivedyaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
naivedyaṃ modakamayaṛtuphalāni ca samarpayāmi||
Naivedyam Grihyatam Deva Bhaktim Me Hyachalam Kuru|
Ipsitam Me Varam Dehi Paratra Cha Param Gatim||
Sharkara-Khanda-Khadyani Dadhi-Kshira-Ghritani Cha|
Aharam Bhakshya-Bhojyam Cha Naivedyam Pratigrihyatam||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Naivedyam Modakamayarituphalani Cha Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-ch:
candanaṃ malayodbhūtaṃ kastūryādi-samanvitam|
karodvartanakaṃ deva gṛhāṇa parameśvara||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
candanena karodvartanaṃ samarpayāmi||
Chandanam Malayodbhutam Kasturyadi-Samanvitam|
Karodvartanakam Deva Grihana Parameshwara||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Chandanena Karodvartanam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-ta:
oṃ pūgīphalaṃ mahaddivyaṃ nāgavallīdalairyutam|
elācūrṇādisaṃyuktaṃ tāmbūlaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
mukha-vāsārtham-elā-pūgī-phalādi-sahitaṃ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi||
Om Pugiphalam Mahaddivyam Nagavallidalairyutam|
Elachurnadisamyuktam Tambulam Pratigrihyatam||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Mukha-Vasartham-Ela-Pugi-Phaladi-Sahitam Tambulam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-na:
idaṃ phalaṃ mayā deva sthāpitaṃ puratastava|
tena me saphalāvāptirbhavejjanmani janmani||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
nārikela-phalaṃ samarpayāmi||
Idam Phalam Maya Deva Sthapitam Puratastava|
Tena Me Saphalavaptirbhavejjanmani Janmani||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Narikela-Phalam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-da:
hiraṇyagarbhagarbhasthaṃ hemabījaṃ vibhāvasoḥ|
anantapuṇyaphaladamataḥ śāntiṃ prayaccha me||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
dravya-dakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi||
Hiranyagarbhagarbhastham Hemabijam Vibhavasoh|
Anantapunyaphaladamatah Shantim Prayachchha Me||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Dravya-Dakshinam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-ni:
kadalīgarbhasambhūtaṃ karpūraṃ tu pradīpitam|
ārārtikyamahaṃ kurve paśya me varado bhava||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
karpūra-nīrājanaṃ samarpayāmi||
Kadaligarbhasambhutam Karpuram Tu Pradipitam|
Arartikyamaham Kurve Pashya Me Varado Bhava||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Karpura-Nirajanam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-pu:
nānāsugandhi-puṣpāṇi yathā kālodbhavāni ca|
puṣpāñjaliṃ mayā dattāṃ gṛhāṇa parameśvara||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
mantra-puṣpāñjaliṃ samarpayāmi||
Nanasugandhi-Pushpani Yatha Kalodbhavani Cha|
Pushpanjalim Maya Dattam Grihana Parameshwara||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Mantra-Pushpanjalim Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-pr:
yāni kāni ca pāpāni jñātājñātakṛtāni ca|
tāni sarvāṇi naśyanti pradakṣiṇāṃ pade pade||
oṃ siddhi-buddhi-sahitāya śrīmahāgaṇādhipataye namaḥ|
pradakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi||
Yani Kani Cha Papani Jnatajnatakritani Cha|
Tani Sarvani Nashyanti Pradakshinam Pade Pade||
Om Siddhi-Buddhi-Sahitaya Shri Mahaganadhipataye Namah|
Pradakshinam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-chaturthi-vi:
āvāhanaṃ na jānāmi na jānāmi tavārcanam|
pūjāṃ caiva na jānāmi kṣamasva gaṇeśvara||
anyathā śaraṇaṃ nāsti tvameva śaraṇaṃ mama|
tasmātkāruṇyabhāvena rakṣasva vighneśvara||
gataṃ pāpaṃ gataṃ duḥkhaṃ gataṃ dāridryameva ca|
āgatā sukhasampattiḥ puṇyācca tava darśanāt||
mantrahīnaṃ kriyāhīnaṃ bhaktihīnaṃ sureśvara|
yatpūjitaṃ mayā deva paripūrṇaṃ tadastu me||
yadakṣarapadabhraṣṭaṃ mātrāhīnaṃ ca yadbhavet|
tatsarvaṃ kṣamyatāṃ deva prasīda parameśvara||
Avahanam Na Janami Na Janami Tavarchanam|
Pujam Chaiva Na Janami Kshamasva Ganeshwara||
Anyatha Sharanam Nasti Tvameva Sharanam Mama|
Tasmatkarunyabhavena Rakshasva Vighneshwara||
Gatam Papam Gatam Duhkham Gatam Daridryameva Cha|
Agata Sukhasampattih Punyachcha Tava Darshanat||
Mantrahinam Kriyahinam Bhaktihinam Sureshwara|
Yatpujitam Maya Deva Paripurnam Tadastu Me||
Yadaksharapadabhrashtam Matrahinam Cha Yadbhavet|
Tatsarvam Kshamyatam Deva Prasida Parameshwara||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:shri-ganapati-avirbh:
oṃ gaṇānāṃ tvā gaṇapatigaṃ havāmahe kaviṃ kavīnāmupamaśravastamam|
jyeṣṭharājaṃ brahmaṇāṃ brahmaṇaspata ā naḥ śṛṇvannūtibhiḥ sīda sādanam||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:shri-ganapati-avahan:
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ śrīgaṇapate!
ihāgaccha, iha tiṣṭha, mama pūjāṃ gṛhāṇa|
Ihagachchha, Iha Tishtha, Mama Pujam Grihana|
mantra:gauri-ganesh:shri-ganapati-prana-:
oṃ mano jūtirjuṣatāmājyasva bṛhaspatiryajñamimaṃ tano tvariṣṭaṃ yajña samimaṃ dadhātu|
viśve-devā sa iha mādayantām oṃ pratiṣṭha|
Tano Tvarishtam Yajna Samimam Dadhatu|
Vishve-Deva Sa Iha Madayantam Om Pratishtha|
mantra:gauri-ganesh:shri-ganapati-dashop:
oṃ gaṇapataye namaḥ pādayoḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ gaṇapataye namaḥ śirasi arghyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ gaṇapataye namaḥ gandhākṣataṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ gaṇapataye namaḥ puṣpaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ gaṇapataye namaḥ dhūpaṃ ghrāpayāmi|
oṃ gaṇapataye namaḥ dīpaṃ darśayāmi|
oṃ gaṇapataye namaḥ naivedyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ gaṇapataye namaḥ ācamanīyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ gaṇapataye namaḥ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ gaṇapataye namaḥ dakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi|
Om Ganapataye Namah Padayoh Padyam Samarpayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Shirasi Arghyam Samarpayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Gandhakshatam Samarpayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Pushpam Samarpayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Dhupam Ghrapayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Dipam Darshayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Naivedyam Samarpayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Achamaniyam Samarpayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Tambulam Samarpayami|
Om Ganapataye Namah Dakshinam Samarpayami|
mantra:gauri-ganesh:shri-ganapati-prarth:
anena pūjanena śrīgaṇapatiḥ prīyatām|
Anena Pujanena Shriganapatih Priyatam|
mantra:gauri-ganesh:shri-ganesha-dhyana-:
udyad-dineśvara-ruciṃ nija-hasta-padmaiḥ,
pāśāṃkuśābhaya-varān dadhataṃ gajāsyam|
raktāmbaraṃ sakala-duḥkhaharaṃ gaṇeśam,
dhyāye prasannamakhilābharaṇābhirāmam||
Pashankushabhaya-Varan Dadhatam Gajasyam|
Dhyaye Prasannamakhilabharanabhiramam||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:shri-ganesha-sashtan:
namaḥ sarva-hitārthāya jagadādhāra-hetave|
sāṣṭāṅgo'yaṃ supraṇāmaḥ prayatnena mayā kṛtaḥ||
namo'stvanantāya sahasra-mūrtaye sahasra-pādākṣi-śiroru-bāhave|
||śrīgaṇeśa-devāya namaḥ sāṣṭāṅga-praṇāmaṃ samarpayāmi||
Namah Sarva-Hitarthaya Jagadadhara-Hetave|
Sashtangoayam Supranamah Prayatnena Maya Kritah||
Namoastvanantaya Sahasra-Murtaye Sahasra-Padakshi-Shiroru-Bahave|
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Sashtanga-Pranamam Samarpayami||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:shri-ganesha-kshama-:
Avahanam Na Janami Na Janami Visarjanam|
Pujakarma Na Janami Kshamasva Parameshwara||
Maya Yatpujitam Deva! Paripurnam Tadastu Me||
Aparadhasahasrani Kriyanteaharnisham Maya|
Dasoayamiti Mam Matva Kshamasva Parameshwara|
Vidhehi Deva! Kalyanam Vidhehi Vipulam Shriyam|
Rupam Dehi Jayam Dehi Yasho Dehi Dwisho Jahi||
Yasya Smritya Cha Namoktya Tapo-Yajna-Kriyadishu|
Nunam Sampurnatam Yati Sadyo Vande Tamachyutam||
Anena Yatha-Militopachara-Dravyaih Krita-Pujanena Shriganesha-Devah Priyatam|
||Shriganesha-Devarpanamastu||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:shri-ganesha-raksha-:
oṃ rakṣa rakṣa gaṇādhyakṣa! rakṣa trailokya-rakṣaka!
bhaktānāmabhayaṃ karttā! trātā bhava bhavārṇavāt|
||anena pūjanena śrīgaṇeśaḥ ṛddhi-siddhi-sahitaḥ prīyatām, namo namaḥ||
Bhaktanamabhayam Kartta! Trata Bhava Bhavarnavat|
||Anena Pujanena Shriganeshah Riddhi-Siddhi-Sahitah Priyatam, Namo Namah||
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-yantra-anugy:
Om Sachinmayah Paro Devah Paramritarasapriyah|
Anugyam Dehi Ganapa Pariwararchanaya Me||
Pushpanjalimadaya|
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-yantra-avara:
Om Abhishta Siddhim Me Dehi Sharanagata Vatsala|
Bhaktya Samarpaye Tubhyam Prathamavaranarchanam||
Pujitah Tarpitah Santu|
mantra:gauri-ganesh:ganesha-visarjan-slo:
mūṣikavāhana modakahasta
cāmarakarṇa vilambitasūtra |
vāmanarūpa mahesvaraputra
vighnavināyaka pāda namaste ||
mantra:gayatri-mantra:gayatri-mantra-dev:
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ |
tatsaviturvareṇyaṃ |
bhargo devasya dhīmahi |
dhiyo yo naḥ pracodayāt ||
mantra:govardhan:govardhan-aarti:
Tere Mathe Mukuta Viraja Raheo|
Tope Chadhe Dudha Ki Dhara...||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-sankalpa-:
oṃ tatsat adya amukasaṃvatsare, māsottame, amukatithau,
amukavāsare, amukagotrotpanno'ham, amukanāma ādi...
sakalakāmanāsiddhyarthaṃ śrīhanumatpūjāṃ kariṣye|
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-avahana-m:
śrīhanumataḥ prāṇā iha prāṇā hanumato jīva iha sthitaḥ,
sarvendrayāṇi vāṅmanastvakcakṣurjihvāghrāṇapāṇipādapāyūpasthāni
hanumata ihāgatya sukhaṃ ciraṃ tiṣṭhantu svāhā|
śrīrāmacaraṇāmbhoja-yugalasthiramānasam|
āvāhayāmi varadaṃ hanumantam abhīṣṭadam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ āvāhanaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-dhyana-ma:
karṇikārasuvarṇābhaṃ varṇanīyaṃ guṇottamam|
arṇavollaṅghanodyuktaṃ tūrṇaṃ dhyāyāmi mārutim||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ dhyānaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-asana-man:
navaratnamayaṃ divyaṃ caturasramanuttamam|
sauvarṇamāsanaṃ tubhyaṃ kalpaye kapināyaka||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ āsanaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-padya-man:
suvarṇakalaśānītaṃ suṣṭhu vāsitamādarāt|
pādayoḥ pādyamanaghaṃ pratigṛhṇa prasīda me||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-arghya-ma:
kusumākṣatasammiśraṃ gṛhyatāṃ kapipuṅgava|
dāsyāmi te añjanīputra svamarghyaṃ ratnasaṃyutam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ arghyaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-achamana-:
mahārākṣasadarpaghna surādhipasupūjita|
vimalaṃ śamalaghna tvaṃ gṛhāṇācamanīyakam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ ācamanaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-panchamri:
madhvājyakṣīradadhibhiḥ saguḍairmantrasaṃyutaiḥ|
pañcāmṛtaiḥ pṛthak snānaiḥ siñcāmi tvāṃ kapīśvara||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ pañcāmṛtasnānaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-shuddhoda:
suvarṇakalaśānītairgaṅgādisaridudbhavaiḥ|
śuddhodakaiḥ kapīśa tvāmabhiṣiñcāmi mārute||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ śuddhodakasnānaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-maunji-me:
grathitāṃ navabhī ratnairmekhalāṃ triguṇīkṛtām|
mauñjīṃ muñjamayīṃ pītāṃ gṛhāṇa pavanātmaja||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ mauñjīmekhalāṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-katisutra:
kaṭisūtraṃ gṛhāṇedaṃ kaupīnaṃ brahmacāriṇaḥ|
kauśeyaṃ kapiśārdūla haridrāktaṃ sumaṅgalam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ kaṭisūtraṃ evaṃ kaupīnaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-uttariya-:
pītāmbaraṃ suvarṇābhamuttarīyārthameva ca|
dāsyāmi jānakīprāṇa-trāṇakāraṇa gṛhyatām||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ uttarīyaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-yajnopavi:
śrautasmārtādikartṝṇāṃ sāṅgopāṅgaphalapradam|
yajñopavītamanaghaṃ dhārayānilanandana||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ yajñopavītaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-gandha-ma:
divyakarpūrasaṃyuktaṃ mṛganābhisamanvitam|
sakuṅkumaṃ pītagandhaṃ lalāṭe dhāraya prabho||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ gandhaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-akshata-m:
haridrāktānakṣatāṃstvaṃ kuṅkumadravyamiśritān|
dhāraya śrīgandhamadhye śubhaśobhanavṛddhaye||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ akṣatān samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-pushpa-ma:
nīlotpalaiḥ kokanadaiḥ kahlāraiḥ kamalairapi|
kumudaiḥ puṇḍarīkaistvāṃ pūjayāmi kapīśvaraḥ||
mallikājātipuṣpaiśca pāṭalaiḥ kuṭajairapi|
ketakībakulaiścūtaiḥ punnāgairnāgakesaraiḥ||
campakaiḥ śatapatraiśca karavīrairmanoharaiḥ|
pūjaye tvāṃ kapiśreṣṭha savilvaistulasīdalaiḥ||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ puṣpāṇi samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-granthi-p:
añjanīsūnave namaḥ, prathamagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
hanumate namaḥ, dvitīyagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
vāyuputrāya namaḥ, tṛtīyagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
mahābalāya namaḥ, caturthagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
rāmeṣṭāya namaḥ, pañcamagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
phālgunasakhāya namaḥ, ṣaṣṭhagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
piṅgākṣāya namaḥ, saptamagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
amitavikramāya namaḥ, aṣṭamagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
sītāśokavināśanāya namaḥ, navamagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
kapīśvarāya namaḥ, daśamagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
lakṣmaṇaprāṇadātre namaḥ, ekādaśagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
daśagrīvadarpaghnāya namaḥ, dvādaśagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
bhaviṣyadbrāhmaṇe namaḥ, trayodaśagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-anga-puja:
hanumate namaḥ, pādau pūjayāmi|
sugrīvasakhāya namaḥ, gulphau pūjayāmi|
aṅgadamitrāya namaḥ, jaṅghe pūjayāmi|
rāmadāsāya namaḥ, ūrū pūjayāmi|
akṣaghnāya namaḥ, kaṭiṃ pūjayāmi|
laṅkādahanāya namaḥ, bālaṃ pūjayāmi|
rāmamaṇidāya namaḥ, nābhiṃ pūjayāmi|
sāgarollaṅghanāya namaḥ, madhyaṃ pūjayāmi|
laṅkāmardanāya namaḥ, keśāvaliṃ pūjayāmi|
sañjīvanīhartre namaḥ, stanau pūjayāmi|
saumitriprāṇadāya namaḥ, vakṣaḥ pūjayāmi|
kuṇṭhitadaśakaṇṭhāya namaḥ, kaṇṭhaṃ pūjayāmi|
rāmābhiṣekakāriṇe namaḥ, hastau pūjayāmi|
mantraracitarāmāyaṇāya namaḥ, vaktraṃ pūjayāmi|
prasannavadanāya namaḥ, vadanaṃ pūjayāmi|
piṅganetrāya namaḥ, netre pūjayāmi|
śrutipāragāya namaḥ, śrutiṃ pūjayāmi|
ūrdhvapuṇḍradhāriṇe namaḥ, kapolaṃ pūjayāmi|
maṇikaṇṭhamāline namaḥ, śiraḥ pūjayāmi|
sarvābhīṣṭapradāya namaḥ, sarvāṅgaṃ pūjayāmi|
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-dhupam-ma:
divyaṃ saguggulaṃ sājyaṃ daśāṅgaṃ savahnikam|
gṛhāṇa mārute dhūpaṃ supriyaṃ ghrāṇatarpaṇam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ dhūpamāghrāpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-deepa-man:
ghṛtapūritamujjvālaṃ sitasūryasamaprabham|
atulaṃ tava dāsyāmi vratapūrtyai sudīpakam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ dīpaṃ darśayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-naivedya-:
saśākāpūpasūpādyapāyasāni ca yatnataḥ|
sakṣīradadhi sājyaṃ ca sapūpaṃ ghṛtapācitam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ naivedyaṃ nivedayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-paniya-ma:
godāvarījalaṃ śuddhaṃ svarṇapātrāhṛtaṃ priyam|
pānīyaṃ pāvanodbhūtaṃ svīkuru tvaṃ dayānidhe||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ pānīyaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-uttarapos:
āpoṣaṇaṃ namaste'stu pāparāśitṛṇānalam|
kṛṣṇāveṇījalenaiva kuruṣva pavanātmaja||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ uttarāpoṣaṇaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-hasta-pra:
divākarasutānītajalena spṛśa gandhinā|
hastaprakṣālanārthāya svīkuruṣva dayānidhe||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ hastau prakṣālayituṃ jalaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-shuddha-a:
raghuvīrapadanyāsa-sthiramānasamārute|
kāverījalapūrṇena svīkurvācamanīyakam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ śuddham ācamanīyaṃ jalaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-suvarna-p:
vāyuputra namastubhyaṃ puṣpaṃ sauvarṇakaṃ priyam|
pūjayiṣyāmi te mūrdhni navaratnasamujjvalam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ suvarṇapuṣpaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-tambula-m:
tāmbūlamanaghaṃ svāmin prayatnena prakalpitam|
avalokaya nityaṃ te purato racitaṃ mayā||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-nirajana-:
śatakoṭimahāratna-divyasadratnapātrake|
nīrājanamidaṃ dṛṣṭeratithīkuru mārute||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ nīrājanaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-pushpanja:
mūrdhānaṃ divo aratiṃ pṛthivyā vaiśvānaramṛta ājātamagnim|
kaviṃ samrājamatithiṃ janānāmāsannā pātraṃ janayanta devāḥ||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ puṣpāñjaliṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-pradakshi:
pāpo'haṃ pāpakarmāhaṃ pāpātmā pāpasambhavaḥ|
trāhi māṃ puṇḍarīkākṣa sarvapāpaharo bhava||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ pradakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-namaskara:
namaste'stu mahāvīra namaste vāyunandana|
vilokya kṛpayā nityaṃ trāhi māṃ bhaktavatsala||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ namaskāraṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-doraka-gr:
ye putrapautrādisamastabhāgyam vāñchanti vāyostanayaṃ prapūjya|
trayodaśagranthiyutaṃ tadaṅgaṃ badhnanti haste varadorasūtram||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ dorakagrahaṇaṃ karomi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-purvadora:
añjanī garbhasambhūta rāmakāryārthasambhava|
varadorakṛtā bhāsā rakṣa māṃ prativatsaram||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ pūrvadorakamuttārayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-prarthana:
anena bhagavān kāryapratipādakavigrahaḥ|
hanūmān prīṇito bhūtvā prārthito hṛdi tiṣṭhatu||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ prārthanāṃ karomi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-vayana-da:
yasya smṛtyā ca nāmoktyā tapoyajñakriyādiṣu|
nūnaṃ sampūrṇatāṃ yāti sadyo vande tamacyutam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ vāyanaṃ dadāmi||
mantra:hanuman-chalisa:hanuman-vayana-gr:
dadāti pratigṛhṇāti hanūmāneva naḥ svayam|
vratasyāsya ca pūrtyarthaṃ pratigṛhṇātu vāyanam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ vāyanaṃ pratigrāhayāmi||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-sankalp:
oṃ tatsat adya amukasaṃvatsare, māsottame, amukatithau,
amukavāsare, amukagotrotpanno'ham, amukanāma ādi...
sakalakāmanāsiddhyarthaṃ śrīhanumatpūjāṃ kariṣye|
Sakala Kamana Siddhyartham Shri Hanumatpujam Karishye|
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-avahana:
śrīhanumataḥ prāṇā iha prāṇā hanumato jīva iha sthitaḥ,
sarvendrayāṇi vāṅmanastvakcakṣurjihvāghrāṇapāṇipādapāyūpasthāni
hanumata ihāgatya sukhaṃ ciraṃ tiṣṭhantu svāhā|
śrīrāmacaraṇāmbhoja-yugalasthiramānasam|
āvāhayāmi varadaṃ hanumantam abhīṣṭadam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ āvāhanaṃ samarpayāmi||
Hanumata Ihagatya Sukham Chiram Tishthantu Swaha|
Shrirama Charanambhojayugalasthira Manasam|
Avahayami Varadam Hanumantam Abhishtadam||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Avahanam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-dhyana-:
karṇikārasuvarṇābhaṃ varṇanīyaṃ guṇottamam|
arṇavollaṅghanodyuktaṃ tūrṇaṃ dhyāyāmi mārutim||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ dhyānaṃ samarpayāmi||
Karnikara Suvarnabham Varnaniyam Gunottamam|
Arnavollanghanodyuktam Turnam Dhyayami Marutim||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Dhyanam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-asana-m:
navaratnamayaṃ divyaṃ caturasramanuttamam|
sauvarṇamāsanaṃ tubhyaṃ kalpaye kapināyaka||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ āsanaṃ samarpayāmi||
Navaratnamayam Divyam Chaturasramanuttamam|
Sauvarnamasanam Tubhyam Kalpaye Kapi Nayaka||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Asanam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-padya-m:
suvarṇakalaśānītaṃ suṣṭhu vāsitamādarāt|
pādayoḥ pādyamanaghaṃ pratigṛhṇa prasīda me||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi||
Suvarnakalashanitam Sushthu Vasitamadarat|
Padayoh Padyamanagham Prati Grihna Prasida Me||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Padyam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-arghya-:
kusumākṣatasammiśraṃ gṛhyatāṃ kapipuṅgava|
dāsyāmi te añjanīputra svamarghyaṃ ratnasaṃyutam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ arghyaṃ samarpayāmi||
Kusumakshatasammishram Grihyatam Kapi Pungava|
Dasyami Te Anjani Putra Svamarghyam Ratnasamyutam||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Arghyam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-achaman:
mahārākṣasadarpaghna surādhipasupūjita|
vimalaṃ śamalaghna tvaṃ gṛhāṇācamanīyakam||

Vimalam Shamalaghna Tvam Grihanachamaniyakam||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Achamanam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-pancham:

||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ pañcāmṛtasnānaṃ samarpayāmi||
Madhvajyakshiradadhibhih Sagudairmantrasamyutaih|
Panchamritaih Prithaka Snanaih Sinchami Tvam Kapishwarah||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Panchamrita Snanam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-shuddho:

śuddhodakaiḥ kapīśa tvāmabhiṣiñcāmi mārute||

Suvarnakalashanitairgangadisaridudbhavaih|
Shuddhodakaih Kapisha Tvamabhishinchami Marute||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Shuddhodaka Snanam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-maunji-:
grathitāṃ navabhī ratnairmekhalāṃ triguṇīkṛtām|

||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ mauñjīmekhalāṃ samarpayāmi||
Grathitam Navabhi Ratnairmekhalam Trigunikritam|
Maunjim Munjamayim Pitam Grihana Pavanatmaja||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Maunji Mekhalam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-katisut:
kaṭisūtraṃ gṛhāṇedaṃ kaupīnaṃ brahmacāriṇaḥ|
kauśeyaṃ kapiśārdūla haridrāktaṃ sumaṅgalam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ kaṭisūtraṃ evaṃ kaupīnaṃ samarpayāmi||
Katisutram Grihanedam Kaupinam Brahmacharinah|
Kausheyam Kapishardula Haridraktam Sumangalam||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Katisutram Evam Kaupinam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-uttariy:
pītāmbaraṃ suvarṇābhamuttarīyārthameva ca|
dāsyāmi jānakīprāṇa-trāṇakāraṇa gṛhyatām||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ uttarīyaṃ samarpayāmi||
Pitambaram Suvarnabhamuttariyarthameva Cha|
Dasyami Janaki Pranatranakarana Grihyatam||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Uttariyam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-yajnopa:
śrautasmārtādikartṝṇāṃ sāṅgopāṅgaphalapradam|
yajñopavītamanaghaṃ dhārayānilanandana||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ yajñopavītaṃ samarpayāmi||
Shrautasmartadi Kartrinam Sangopanga Phala Pradam|
Yajnopavitamanagham Dharayanilanandana||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Yajnopavitam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-gandha-:
divyakarpūrasaṃyuktaṃ mṛganābhisamanvitam|
sakuṅkumaṃ pītagandhaṃ lalāṭe dhāraya prabho||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ gandhaṃ samarpayāmi||
Divya Karpura Samyuktam Mriganabhi Samanvitam|
Sakumkumam Pitagandham Lalate Dharaya Prabho||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Gandham Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-akshata:
haridrāktānakṣatāṃstvaṃ kuṅkumadravyamiśritān|
dhāraya śrīgandhamadhye śubhaśobhanavṛddhaye||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ akṣatān samarpayāmi||
Haridraktanakshatanstvam Kumkuma Dravyamishritan|
Dharaya Shri Gandha Madhye Shubha Shobhana Vriddhaye||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Akshatan Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-pushpa-:
nīlotpalaiḥ kokanadaiḥ kahlāraiḥ kamalairapi|
kumudaiḥ puṇḍarīkaistvāṃ pūjayāmi kapīśvaraḥ||
mallikājātipuṣpaiśca pāṭalaiḥ kuṭajairapi|
ketakībakulaiścūtaiḥ punnāgairnāgakesaraiḥ||
campakaiḥ śatapatraiśca karavīrairmanoharaiḥ|
pūjaye tvāṃ kapiśreṣṭha savilvaistulasīdalaiḥ||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ puṣpāṇi samarpayāmi||
Nilotpalaih Kokanadaih Kahlaraih Kamalairapi|
Kumudaih Pundari Kaistvam Pujayami Kapishwarah||
Mallika Jati Pushpaishcha Patalaih Kutajairapi|
Ketaki Bakulaishchutaih Punnagairnagakesaraih||
Champakaih Shatapatraishcha Karavirairmanoharaih|
Pujaye Tvam Kapi Shreshtha Savilvais Tulasidalaih||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Pushpani Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-granthi:

hanumate namaḥ, dvitīyagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
vāyuputrāya namaḥ, tṛtīyagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
mahābalāya namaḥ, caturthagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
rāmeṣṭāya namaḥ, pañcamagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
phālgunasakhāya namaḥ, ṣaṣṭhagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
piṅgākṣāya namaḥ, saptamagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
amitavikramāya namaḥ, aṣṭamagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
sītāśokavināśanāya namaḥ, navamagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
kapīśvarāya namaḥ, daśamagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
lakṣmaṇaprāṇadātre namaḥ, ekādaśagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
daśagrīvadarpaghnāya namaḥ, dvādaśagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|
bhaviṣyadbrāhmaṇe namaḥ, trayodaśagranthiṃ pūjayāmi|

mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-anga-pu:

rāmadāsāya namaḥ, ūrū pūjayāmi|
akṣaghnāya namaḥ, kaṭiṃ pūjayāmi|
laṅkādahanāya namaḥ, bālaṃ pūjayāmi|
rāmamaṇidāya namaḥ, nābhiṃ pūjayāmi|
sāgarollaṅghanāya namaḥ, madhyaṃ pūjayāmi|
laṅkāmardanāya namaḥ, keśāvaliṃ pūjayāmi|
sañjīvanīhartre namaḥ, stanau pūjayāmi|

kuṇṭhitadaśakaṇṭhāya namaḥ, kaṇṭhaṃ pūjayāmi|
rāmābhiṣekakāriṇe namaḥ, hastau pūjayāmi|
mantraracitarāmāyaṇāya namaḥ, vaktraṃ pūjayāmi|
