mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-dhupam-:
divyaṃ saguggulaṃ sājyaṃ daśāṅgaṃ savahnikam|
gṛhāṇa mārute dhūpaṃ supriyaṃ ghrāṇatarpaṇam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ dhūpamāghrāpayāmi||
Divyam Saguggulam Sajyam Dashangam Savahnikam|
Grihana Marute Dhupam Supriyam Ghranatarpanam||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Dhupamaghrapayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-deepa-m:
ghṛtapūritamujjvālaṃ sitasūryasamaprabham|
atulaṃ tava dāsyāmi vratapūrtyai sudīpakam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ dīpaṃ darśayāmi||
Ghrita Puritamujjvalam Sitasuryasamaprabham|
Atulam Tava Dasyami Vrata Purtyai Sudipakam||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Deepam Darshayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-naivedy:
saśākāpūpasūpādyapāyasāni ca yatnataḥ|
sakṣīradadhi sājyaṃ ca sapūpaṃ ghṛtapācitam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ naivedyaṃ nivedayāmi||
Sashakapupasupadyapayasani Cha Yatnatah|
Sakshira Dadhi Sajyam Cha Sapupam Ghritapachitam||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Naivedyam Nivedayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-paniya-:
godāvarījalaṃ śuddhaṃ svarṇapātrāhṛtaṃ priyam|
pānīyaṃ pāvanodbhūtaṃ svīkuru tvaṃ dayānidhe||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ pānīyaṃ samarpayāmi||
Godavari Jalam Shuddham Swarna Patrahritam Priyam|
Paniyam Pavanodbhutam Swikuru Tvam Dayanidhe||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Paniyam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-uttarap:
āpoṣaṇaṃ namaste'stu pāparāśitṛṇānalam|
kṛṣṇāveṇījalenaiva kuruṣva pavanātmaja||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ uttarāpoṣaṇaṃ samarpayāmi||
Aposhanam Namasteastu Paparashi Trinanalam|
Krishnaveni Jalenaiva Kurushva Pavanatmaja||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Uttaraposhanam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-hasta-p:
divākarasutānītajalena spṛśa gandhinā|
hastaprakṣālanārthāya svīkuruṣva dayānidhe||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ hastau prakṣālayituṃ jalaṃ samarpayāmi||
Diwakara Sutanita Jalena Sprisha Gandhina|
Hastaprakshalanarthaya Swikurushva Dayanidhe||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Hastau Prakshalayitum Jalam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-shuddha:
raghuvīrapadanyāsa-sthiramānasamārute|
kāverījalapūrṇena svīkurvācamanīyakam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ śuddham ācamanīyaṃ jalaṃ samarpayāmi||
Raghuvirapada Nyasasthira Manasa Marute|
Kaveri Jala Purnena Swikurvachamaniyakam||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Shuddham Achamaniyam Jalam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-suvarna:
vāyuputra namastubhyaṃ puṣpaṃ sauvarṇakaṃ priyam|
pūjayiṣyāmi te mūrdhni navaratnasamujjvalam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ suvarṇapuṣpaṃ samarpayāmi||
Vayuputra Namastubhyam Pushpam Sauvarnakam Priyam|
Pujayishyami Te Murdhni Navaratna Samujjvalam||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Suvarna Pushpam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-tambula:
tāmbūlamanaghaṃ svāmin prayatnena prakalpitam|
avalokaya nityaṃ te purato racitaṃ mayā||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi||
Tambulamanagham Swamin Prayatnena Prakalpitam|
Avalokaya Nityam Te Purato Rachitam Maya||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Tambulam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-nirajan:
śatakoṭimahāratna-divyasadratnapātrake|
nīrājanamidaṃ dṛṣṭeratithīkuru mārute||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ nīrājanaṃ samarpayāmi||
Shatakotimaharatna-Divyasadratna Patrake|
Nirajana Midam Drishteratithi Kuru Marute||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Nirajanam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-pushpan:
mūrdhānaṃ divo aratiṃ pṛthivyā vaiśvānaramṛta ājātamagnim|
kaviṃ samrājamatithiṃ janānāmāsannā pātraṃ janayanta devāḥ||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ puṣpāñjaliṃ samarpayāmi||
Murdhanam Divo Aratim Prithivya Vaishvanaramrita Ajatamagnim|
Kavim Samrajamatithim Jananama Sanna Patram Janayanta Devah||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Pushpanjalim Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-pradaks:
pāpo'haṃ pāpakarmāhaṃ pāpātmā pāpasambhavaḥ|
trāhi māṃ puṇḍarīkākṣa sarvapāpaharo bhava||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ pradakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi||
Papoaham Papakarmaham Papatma Papa Sambhavah|
Trahimam Pundarikaksha Sarva Papa Haro Bhavah||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Pradakshinam Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-namaska:
namaste'stu mahāvīra namaste vāyunandana|
vilokya kṛpayā nityaṃ trāhi māṃ bhaktavatsala||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ namaskāraṃ samarpayāmi||
Namasteastu Mahavira Namaste Vayunandanah|
Vilokya Kripaya Nityam Trahi Mam Bhakta Vatsalah||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Namaskaram Samarpayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-doraka-:
ye putrapautrādisamastabhāgyam vāñchanti vāyostanayaṃ prapūjya|
trayodaśagranthiyutaṃ tadaṅgaṃ badhnanti haste varadorasūtram||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ dorakagrahaṇaṃ karomi||
Ye Putra Pautradi Samasta Bhagyam Vanchhanti Vayostanayam Prapujya|
Trayodashagranthiyutam Tadangam Badhnanti Haste Varadora Sutram||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Doraka Grahanam Karomi||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-purvado:
añjanī garbhasambhūta rāmakāryārthasambhava|
varadorakṛtā bhāsā rakṣa māṃ prativatsaram||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ pūrvadorakamuttārayāmi||
Anjani Garbha Sambhuta Ramakaryartha Sambhava|
Varadorakrita Bhasa Raksha Mam Prativatsaram||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Purvadorakamuttarayami||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-prartha:
anena bhagavān kāryapratipādakavigrahaḥ|
hanūmān prīṇito bhūtvā prārthito hṛdi tiṣṭhatu||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ prārthanāṃ karomi||
Anena Bhagawan Karya Pratipadaka Vigrahah|
Hanuman Prinito Bhutva Prarthito Hridi Tishthatu||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Prarthanam Karomi||
mantra:hanuman-janmotsav:hanuman-vayana-:
yasya smṛtyā ca nāmoktyā tapoyajñakriyādiṣu|
nūnaṃ sampūrṇatāṃ yāti sadyo vande tamacyutam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ vāyanaṃ dadāmi||
Yasya Smritya Cha Namoktya Tapo Yajnakriyadishu|
Nunam Sampurnatam Yati Sadyo Vande Tamachyutam||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Vayanam Dadami||

dadāti pratigṛhṇāti hanūmāneva naḥ svayam|
vratasyāsya ca pūrtyarthaṃ pratigṛhṇātu vāyanam||
||oṃ śrī hanumate namaḥ vāyanaṃ pratigrāhayāmi||
Dadati Pratigrihnati Hanumaneva Nah Swayam|
Vratasyasya Cha Purtyartham Prati Grihnatu Vayanam||
||Om Shri Hanumate Namah Vayanam Pratigrahayami||
mantra:holika:holi-sankalpa-mantra-devan:
oṃ viṣṇuḥ viṣṇuḥ viṣṇuḥ śrīmadbhagavato mahāpuruṣasya viṣṇorājñayā pravartamānasya adyaitasya brahmaṇo'hni
dvitīyapraharārddhe śvetavarāhakalpe jambūdvīpe bharatakhaṇḍe amuka-pradeśe (apane pradeśa kā nāma leṃ)
amuka-puṇyakṣetre (kṣetra kā nāma leṃ) kaliyuge kaliprathamacaraṇe amuka-saṃvatsare (saṃvatsara kā nāma leṃ)
phālguna-māse śubhe śuklapakṣe pūrṇimāyāṃ śubhatithau amuka-vāsare (dina kā nāma leṃ)
amuka-gotrotpannaḥ (apane gautra kā nāma leṃ) ahaṃ (apane nāma kā uccāraṇa kareṃ)
mama iha janmani janmāntare vā sarvapāpakṣayapūrvaka-dīrghāyuvipuladhanadhānyasamṛddhyarthaṃ
mama daihika-daivika-bhautika-trividha-tāpa-nivṛtyarthaṃ sadabhīṣṭasiddhayarthaṃ ca
prahlādanṛsiṃhaholītyādīnāṃ pūjanamahaṃ kariṣye|
mantra:holika:holi-ganesha-dhyana-mantra:
gajānanaṃ bhūtagaṇādisevitaṃ kapitthajambūphalacārubhakṣaṇam|
umāsutaṃ śokavināśakārakaṃ namāmi vighneśvarapādapaṅkajam||
oṃ gaṃ gaṇapataye namaḥ pañcopacārārthe gandhākṣatapuṣpāṇi samarpayāmi|

Gajananam Bhutaganadisevitam Kapitthajambuphala-Charubhakshanam|
Umasutam Shokavinashakarakam Namami Vighneshvara-Padapankajam||
Panchopachararthe Gandhakshatapushpani Samarpayami|
mantra:holika:holi-ambika-dhyana-mantra-:
oṃ sarvamaṅgalamaṅgalye śive sarvārthasādhike|
śaraṇye tryambake gauri nārāyaṇi namo'stu te||
oṃ ambikāyai namaḥ pañcopacārārthe gandhākṣatapuṣpāṇi samarpayāmi|

Om Sarvamangalamangalye Shive Sarvarthasadhike|
Sharanye Tryambake Gauri Narayani Namoastu Te||
Panchopachararthe Gandhakshatapushpani Samarpayami|
mantra:holika:holi-narasimha-dhyana-mant:
oṃ satyaṃ jñānasukhasvarūpamamalaṃ kṣīrābdhimadhyesthitam
yogārūḍhamatiprasannavadanaṃ bhūṣāsahasrojvalam|
tīkṣṇaṃ cakrapinākaśāyakavarān vibhrāṇamarkacchavi|
chatraṃ bhūtaphaṇīndramindudhavalaṃ lakṣmīnṛsiṃhaṃ bhaje||
oṃ nṛsiṃhāya namaḥ pañcopacārārthe gandhākṣatapuṣpāṇi samarpayāmi|
Om Nrisimhaya Namah Panchopachararthe Gandhakshatapushpani Samarpayami|
mantra:holika:holi-prahalada-dhyana-mant:
brahmādayaḥ suragaṇā munayo'tha siddhāḥ sattvaikatānagatayo vacasāṃ pravāhaiḥ|
nārādhituṃ puruguṇairadhunāpi pipruḥ kiṃ toṣṭumarhati sa me harirugrajāteḥ||
oṃ prahlādāya namaḥ pañcopacārārthe gandhākṣatapuṣpāṇi samarpayāmi|

Sattvaikatanagatayo Vachasam Pravahaih|
Kim Toshtumarhati Sa Me Harirugrajateh||
Panchopachararthe Gandhakshatapushpani Samarpayami|
mantra:holika:holi-prarthana-mantra-deva:
asṛkpābhayasaṃtrastaiḥ kṛtā tvaṃ holi bāliśaiḥ|
atastvāṃ pūjayiṣyāmi bhūte bhūtipradā bhava||
mantra:holika:holi-prarthana-mantra-roma:
Asrikpabhayasantrastaih Krita Tvam Holi Balishaih|
Atastvam Pujayishyami Bhute Bhutiprada Bhava||
mantra:kaal-sarp-dosh:rahu-ketu-kaal-sar:
rāhu ketu madhye sapto vidhna hā kāla sarpa sārika:|
sutayāsādi sakalādoṣā rogena pravāse caraṇaṃ dhruvama||
mantra:kali:shri-kali-dhyana-mantra:
oṃ sadyaśchinnaśiraḥ kṛpāṇamabhayaṃ hastairvaraṃ bibhratīṃ|
ghorāsyāṃ śirasāṃ srajaṃ surucirāṃ unmuktakeśāvalim||
sṛkkāsṛkpravahāṃ śmaśānanilayāṃ śrutyoḥ śavālaṅkṛtiṃ|
śyāmāṅgīṃ kṛta-mekhalāṃ śava-karairdevīṃ bhaje kālikām||
mantra:kali:shri-kali-avahana-mantra:
oṃ deveśi! bhakti sulabhe! parivārasaminvate!
yāvat tvāṃ pūjayiṣyāmi tavāt tvaṃ susthirā bhava||
duṣpāre ghora-saṃsāra-sāgare patitaṃ sadā|
trāyasva varade devi! namaste cit-parātmike||
ye devā yāśca devyaśca calitāyāṃ calanti hi|
āvāhayāmi tān sarvān kālike parameśvari||
prāṇān rakṣa yaśo rakṣa rakṣa dārān sutān dhanam|
sarva-rakṣā-karī yasmāt tvaṃ hi devi jaganmaye||
praviśya tiṣṭha yajñe'smin yāvat pūjāṃ karomyaham|
sarvānanda-kare devi! sarvasiddhiṃ prayaccha me||
tiṣṭhātra kālike mātaḥ! sarva-kalyāṇa-hetave|
pūjāṃ gṛhāṇa sumukhi! namaste śaṅkara-priye||
|| śrīmahā-kālī-devīm āvāhayāmi||
mantra:kali:shri-kali-pushpanjali-asana-:
nānā-ratna-samāyuktaṃ kārtasvara-vibhūṣitam|
āsanaṃ devi deveśi! prītyarthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
|| śrīmahā-kālī-daivyai āsanārthe pañca-puṣpāṇi samarpayāmi||
mantra:kali:shri-kali-navopachara-puja-m:
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ pādayoḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ śirasi arghyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ gandhākṣatān samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ puṣpaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ dhūpam āghrāpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ dīpaṃ darśayāmi|
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ naivedyaṃ nivedayāmi|
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ ācamanīyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkālī-devyai namaḥ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi|
mantra:kali:shri-kali-puja-samarpana-man:
oṃ śrīmahākālyai namaḥ|
anena pūjanena śrīkālī devī prīyatām|
namo namaḥ|
mantra:karwa-chauth:sankalp-mantra: mama sukhasaubhāgya putrapautrādi susthira śrī prāptaye karaka caturthī vratamahaṃ kariṣye|
mantra:karwa-chauth:parvati-puja-mantra: namaḥ śivāyai śarvāṇyai saubhāgyaṃ saṃtati śubhām| prayaccha bhaktiyuktānāṃ nārīṇāṃ haravallabhe||
mantra:karwa-chauth:karwa-donation-mantr: karakaṃ kṣīrasampūrṇā toyapūrṇamathāpi vā| dadāmi ratnasaṃyuktaṃ cirañjīvatu me patiḥ||
mantra:krishna-janmashtami:krishna-janma:
oṃ tamadbhutaṃ bālakamambujekṣaṇaṃ caturbhujaṃ śaṃkhagadāryudāyudham|
śrīvatsalakṣmaṃ galaśobhikaustubhaṃ pītāmbaraṃ sāndrapayodasaubhagam||
mahārhavaidūryakirīṭakuṇḍalatviṣā pariṣvaktasahasrakuntalam|
uddāmakāñcyaṅgadakaṅkaṇādibhirvirocamānaṃ vasudeva aikṣata||
dhyāyet caturbhujaṃ kṛṣṇaṃ śaṃkhacakragadādharam|
pītambaradharaṃ devaṃ mālākaustubhabhūṣitam||
oṃ śrīkṛṣṇāya namaḥ| dhyānāt dhyānaṃ samarpayāmi||

oṃ sahasraśīrṣā puruṣaḥ sahasrākṣaḥ sahasrapāt|
sa bhūmiṃ viśvato vṛtvā atyatiṣṭhaddaśāṅgulam||
āgaccha devadeveśa tejorāśe jagatpate|
kriyamāṇāṃ mayā pūjāṃ gṛhāṇa surasattama||
āvāhayāmi deva tvāṃ vasudevakulodbhavam|
pratimāyāṃ suvarṇādinirmitāyāṃ yathāvidhi||
kṛṣṇaṃ ca balabhadraṃ ca vasudevaṃ ca devakīm|
nandagopaṃ yaśodāṃ ca subhadrāṃ tatra pūjayet||
ātmā devānāṃ bhuvanasya garbho yathāvaśaṃ carati deveṣaḥ|
ghoṣā idasya śarṇvire na rūpaṃ tasmai vātāya haviṣā vidhema||
oṃ śrīklīṃkṛṣṇāya namaḥ| saparivāraṃ śrībālakṛṣṇam āvāhayāmi||

puruṣa evedagaṃ sarvam yadbhūtaṃ yaccha bhavyam|
utāmṛtatvasyeśānaḥ yadannenātirohati||
rājādhirāja rājendra bālakṛṣṇa mahīpate|
ratnasiṃhāsanaṃ tubhyaṃ dāsyāmi svīkuru prabho||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| āsanaṃ samarpayāmi||

etāvānasya mahimā ato jyāyāgaśca pūruṣaḥ|
pādo'sya viśvā bhūtāni tripādasyāmṛtaṃ divi||
acyutānanda govinda praṇatārtivināśana|
pāhi māṃ puṇḍarīkākṣa prasīda puruṣottama||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| pādayoḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi||

tripādūrdhva udaitpuruṣaḥ pādo'syehābhavātpunaḥ|
tato viśvaṅvyakrāmat sāśanānaśane abhi||
paripūrṇa parānanda namo kṛṣṇāya vedhase|
gṛhāṇārghyaṃ mayā dattaṃ kṛṣṇa viṣṇo janārdana||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| arghyaṃ samarpayāmi||

tasmādvirāḍajāyata virājo adhi pūruṣaḥ|
sa jāto atyaricyata paścādbhūmimatho puraḥ||
namaḥ satyāya śuddhāya nityāya jñānarūpiṇe|
gṛhāṇācamanaṃ kṛṣṇa sarvalokaikanāyaka||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| ācamanīyaṃ samarpayāmi||

yatpuruṣeṇa haviṣā devā yajñamatanvata|
vasanto asyāsīdājyam grīṣma idhmaśśaraddhaviḥ||
brahmāṇḍodaramadhyasthairstithaiśca yadunandana|
snāpayiṣyāmyahaṃ bhaktyā tvaṃ gṛhāṇa janārdana||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| malāpakarṣasnānaṃ samarpayāmi||

oṃ taṃ yajñaṃ barhiṣi praukṣan puruṣaṃ jātamagrataḥ|
tena devā ayajanta sādhyā ṛṣayaśca ye||
oṃ upaitu māṃ devasakhaḥ kīrtiśca maṇinā saha|
prādurbhūto'smi rāṣṭresminkīrtimṛddhiṃ dadātu me||
taptakāñcanasaṃkāśaṃ pītāmbaram idaṃ hare|
saṃgṛhāṇa jagannātha bālakṛṣṇa namo'stute||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| vastrayugmaṃ samarpayāmi||

tasmādyajñātsarvahutaḥ saṃbhṛtaṃ pṛṣadājyam|
paśūga~stāgaṃścakre vāyavyān āraṇyān grāmyāśca ye||
kṣutpipāsāmalāṃ jyeṣṭhāmalakṣmīṃ nāśayāmyaham|
abhūtimasamṛddhiṃ ca sarvāṃ nirṇuda me gṛhāt||
śrībālakṛṣṇa deveśa śrīdharānanta rāghava|
brahmasūtraṃ cottarīyaṃ gṛhāṇa yadunandana||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| yajñopavītaṃ samarpayāmi||

tasmādyajñātsarvahutaḥ ṛcaḥ sāmāni jajñire|
chandāgaṃsi jajñire tasmāt yajustasmādajāyata||
gandhadvārāṃ durādharṣāṃ nityapuṣṭāṃ karīṣiṇīm|
īśvarīgaṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ tāmihopahvaye śriyam||
kuṃkumāguru kastūrī karpūraṃ candanaṃ tathā|
tubhyaṃ dāsyāmi rājendra śrīkṛṣṇa svīkuru prabho||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| gandhaṃ samarpayāmi||

vajramāṇikyavaidūryamuktāvidrūmamaṇḍitam‌|
puṣparāgasamāyuktaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ pratigṛhyatām‌||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| ābharaṇāni samarpayāmi||

oṃ ahiriva bhogaiḥ paryeti bāhuṃ jayāyā hetiṃ paribādhamānaḥ|
hastaghno viśvā vayunāni vidvānpumānpumāṃsaṃ paripātu viśvataḥ||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| nānā parimaladravyaṃ samarpayāmi||

mālyādīni sugandhīni mālyatyādīni vai prabho|
mayā hṛtāni pūjārthaṃ puṣpāṇi pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| puṣpāṇi samarpayāmi||

oṃ govindāya namaḥ| pādau pūjayāmi||
oṃ mādhavāya namaḥ| jaṃghe pūjayāmi||
oṃ madhusūdanāya namaḥ| kaṭī pūjayāmi||
oṃ padmanābhāya namaḥ| nābhiṃ pūjayāmi||
oṃ hṛṣīkeśāya namaḥ| hṛdayaṃ pūjayāmi||
oṃ saṃkarṣaṇāya namaḥ| stanau pūjayāmi||
oṃ vāmanāya namaḥ| bāhū pūjayāmi||
oṃ daityasūdanāya namaḥ| hastau pūjayāmi||
oṃ harikeśāya namaḥ| kaṇṭhaṃ pūjayāmi||
oṃ cārumukhāya namaḥ| mukhaṃ pūjayāmi||
oṃ trivikramāya namaḥ| nāsikāṃ pūjayāmi||
oṃ puṇḍarīkākṣāya namaḥ| netre pūjayāmi||
oṃ nṛsiṃhāya namaḥ| śrotre pūjayāmi||
oṃ upendrāya namaḥ| lalāṭaṃ pūjayāmi||
oṃ haraye namaḥ| śiraḥ pūjayāmi||
oṃ śrīkṛṣṇāya namaḥ| sarvāṅgaṃ pūjayāmi||

vanaspatyudbhavo divyo gandhāḍhyo gandha uttamaḥ|
bālakṛṣṇa mahīpāla dhūpo'yaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
yatpuruṣaṃ vyadadhuḥ katidhā vyakalpayan|
mukhaṃ kimasya kau bāhū kāvūrū pādāvucyete||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| dhūpam āghrāpayāmi||

sājyaṃ trivartisaṃyuktaṃ vahninā yojitaṃ mayā|
gṛhāṇa maṅgalaṃ dīpaṃ trailokyatimirāpaham||
bhaktyā dīpaṃ prayacchāmi devāya paramātmane|
trāhi māṃ narakāt ghorāt dīpo jyotirnamostute||
brāhmaṇosya mukhamāsīt bāhū rājanyaḥ kṛtaḥ|
urū tadasya yadvaiśyaḥ padbhyāgaṃ śūdro ajāyata||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| dīpaṃ darśayāmi||

oṃ kṛṣṇāya vidmahe| balabhadrāya dhīmahi|
tanno viṣṇu pracodayāt||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ|
nirviṣīkaraṇārthe tārkṣamudrā|
amṛtīkaraṇārthe dhenumudrā|
pavitrīkaraṇārthe śaṅkhamudrā|
saṃrakṣaṇārthe cakramudrā|
vipulamayakaraṇārthe merumudrā|
oṃ satyaṃ tvartena pariṣiñcāmi|
bhoḥ! svāmin bhojanārtham āgaccha|
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ|
amṛtopastaraṇamasi svāhā|
oṃ prāṇātmane nārāyaṇāya svāhā|
oṃ apānātmane vāsudevāya svāhā|
oṃ vyānātmane saṅkarṣaṇāya svāhā|
oṃ udānātmane pradyumnāya svāhā|
oṃ samānātmane aniruddhāya svāhā|
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ|
naivedyaṃ gṛhyatāṃ deva bhaktiṃ me acalāṃ kuru|
īpsitaṃ me varaṃ dehi ihātra ca parāṃ gatim||
śrīkṛṣṇa namastubhyaṃ mahānaivedyamuttamam|
saṃgṛhāṇa suraśreṣṭhin bhaktimuktipradāyakam||
oṃ candramā manaso jātaḥ cakṣoḥ sūryo ajāyata|
mukhādindraścāgniśca prāṇādvāyurajāyata||
oṃ ārdrāṃ puṣkariṇīṃ puṣṭiṃ suvarṇāṃ hemamālinīm|
sūryāṃ hiraṇmayīṃ lakṣmīṃ jātavedo ma āvaha||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| naivedyaṃ samarpayāmi||
sarvatra amṛtāpidhānamasi svāhā||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| uttarāpoṣaṇaṃ samarpayāmi||

pūgīphalaṃ satāmbūlaṃ nāgavallidalairyutam|
tāmbūlaṃ gṛhyatāṃ kṛṣṇa elālavaṅgasaṃyutam||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| sapūgīphalaṃ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi||

hiraṇyagarbhagarbhasthaṃ hemabījaṃ vibhāvasoḥ|
anantapuṇyaphaladamataḥ śāntiṃ prayaccha me||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| dakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi||

oṃ śriye jāta śriya āniryāya śriyaṃ vayo janitṛbhyo dadhātu|
śriyaṃ vasānā amṛtatvamāyan bhajaṃti sadyaḥ savitā vidadhyūn|
śriya evainaṃ tacchriyāmādadhāti| santatamṛcā vaṣaṭkṛtyaṃ
sandhattaṃ sandhīyate prajayā paśubhiḥ| ya evaṃ veda||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| mahānīrājanaṃ dīpaṃ samarpayāmi||

oṃ nābhyā āsīdantarikṣam śīrṣṇo dyauḥ samavartata|
padbhyāṃ bhūmirdiśaḥ śrotrāt tathā lokā~ akalpayan||
ārdrāṃ puṣkariṇīṃ puṣṭiṃ piṅgalāṃ padmamālinīm|
candrāṃ hiraṇmayīṃ lakṣmīṃ jātavedo ma āvaha||
yāni kāni ca pāpāni janmāntarakṛtāni ca|
tāni tāni vinaśyanti pradakṣiṇe pade pade||
anyathā śaraṇaṃ nāsti tvameva śaraṇaṃ mama|
tasmāt kāruṇyabhāvena rakṣa māṃ yadunandana||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| pradakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi||

namo brahmaṇyadevāya gobrāhmaṇahitāya ca|
jagadīśāya kṛṣṇāya govindāya namo namaḥ||
kṛṣṇāya vāsudevāya haraye paramātmane|
praṇatakleśanāśāya govindāya namo namaḥ||
namastubhyaṃ jagannāthadevakītanaya prabho|
vasudevātmajānanda yaśodānandavardhana||
govinda gokulādhāra gopīkānta namostute|
saptāsyāsan paridhayaḥ trissapta samidhaḥ kṛtāḥ|
devā yadyajñaṃ tanvānāḥ abadhnanpuruṣaṃ paśum||
tāṃ ma āvaha jātavedo lakṣmīmanapagāminīm|
yasyāṃ hiraṇyaṃ prabhūtaṃ gāvo dāsyo'śvān vindeyaṃ puruṣānaham||
namaḥ sarvahitārthāya jagadādhārahetave|
sāṣṭāṅgoyaṃ praṇāmaste prayatnena mayā kṛtaḥ|
urasā śirasā dṛṣṭyā manasā vacasā tathā|
padbhyāṃ karābhyāṃ jānubhyāṃ praṇāmo'ṣṭāṅga ucyate||
śātyenāpi namaskārān kurvataḥ śārṅgapāṇaye|
śatajanmārcitaṃ pāpaṃ tatkṣaṇādeva naśyati||
oṃ śrībālakṛṣṇāya namaḥ| namaskārān samarpayāmi||

aparādhasahasrāṇi kriyante'harniśaṃ mayā|
dāso'yamiti māṃ matvā kṣamasva puruṣottama||
yāntu deva gaṇāḥ sarve pūjām ādāya pārthivīm|
iṣṭakāmyārthasiddhyarthaṃ punarāgamanāya ca||
||oṃ śrīkṛṣṇārpaṇamastu||
mantra:kuber-upasana:shri-kubera-dhyana-:
manuja-bāhya-vimāna-sthitam,
garuḍa-ratna-nibhaṃ nidhi-nāyakam|
śiva-sakhaṃ mukuṭādi-vibhūṣitam,
vara-gade dadhataṃ bhaje tundilam||

Garuda-Ratna-Nibham Nidhi-Naykam|
Vara-Gade Dadhatam Bhaje Tundilam||
mantra:kuber-upasana:shri-kubera-avahana:
āvāhayāmi deva! tvāmihāyāhi kṛpāṃ kuru|
kośaṃ varddhaya nityaṃ tvaṃ pari-rakṣa sureśvara||
||śrīkubera-devam āvāhayāmi||

Avahayami Deva! Tvamihayahi Kripam Kuru|
Kosham Varddhaya Nityam Tvam Pari-Raksha Sureshwara||
|| Shri Kuber-Devam Avahayami ||
mantra:kuber-upasana:shri-kubera-pushpan:
nānā-ratna-samāyuktaṃ kārtta-svara-vibhūṣitam|
āsanaṃ deva-deveśa! prītyarthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
||śrīkubera-devāya āsanārthe pañca-puṣpāṇi samarpayāmi||

Nana-Ratna-Samayuktam Kartta-Swara-Vibhushitam|
Asanam Deva-Devesha! Prityartham Prati-Grihyatam||
|| Shri Kuber-Devaya Asanarthe Pancha-Pushpani Samarpayami ||
mantra:kuber-upasana:shri-kubera-nav-upc:
oṃ śrīkuberāya namaḥ pādayoḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkuberāya namaḥ śirasi arghyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkuberāya namaḥ gandhākṣatān samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkuberāya namaḥ puṣpaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkuberāya namaḥ dhūpam āghrāpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkuberāya namaḥ dīpaṃ darśayāmi|
oṃ śrīkuberāya namaḥ naivedyaṃ nivedayāmi|
oṃ śrīkuberāya namaḥ ācamanīyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīkuberāya namaḥ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi|

Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Padayoh Padyam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Shirasi Arghyam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Gandhakshatan Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Pushpam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Dhupam Aghrapayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Dipam Darshayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Naivedyam Nivedayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Achamaniyam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namah Tambulam Samarpayami|
mantra:kuber-upasana:shri-kubera-puja-sa:
oṃ śrīkuberāya namaḥ|
anena pūjanena śrīdhanādhyakṣaḥ śrīkuberaḥ prīyatām|
namo namaḥ|

Om Shri Kuberaya Namha|
Anena Pujanena Shri Dhanadhyakshah Shri Kuberah Priyatam|
Namo Namah|
mantra:kuber-upasana:shri-kuber-dhyana-m:
Garuda–Ratna–Nibham Nidhi–Naykam|
Var–Gade Dadhatam Bhaje Tundilam||
mantra:kuber-upasana:shri-kuber-aavahan-:
Aavahayami Dev! Tvamihayahi Kripam Kuru|
Kosham Vardhdaya Nityam, Tvam Pari–Raksha Sureshwar||
|| Shri Kuber–Devam Aavahayami||
mantra:kuber-upasana:shri-kuber-pushpanj:
Nana–Ratna–Samayuktam Kartya–Swar–Vibhushitam|
Aasanam Dev–Devesh! Preetyartham Prati-Grihyataam||
|| Shri Kuber-Devay Aasanarthe Pancha-Pushpani Samarpayami||
mantra:kuber-upasana:shri-kuber-navopcha:
Om Shri Kuberaya Namha Padyom Padhyam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namha Shirsi Arghyam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namha Gandhakshatam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namha Pushpam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namha Dhoopam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namha Deepam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namha Naivedhyam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namha Aachamaneeyam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Kuberaya Namha Tamboolam Samarpayami|
mantra:kuber-upasana:shri-kuber-puja-sam:
Om Shri Kuberaya Namha|
Anen Pujanen Shri Dhanadhyaksha-Shri Kuber Preeyatam|
Namo Namah|
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-dhyan:
yā sā padmāsanasthā vipula-kaṭi-taṭī padma-patrāyatākṣī|
gambhīrārtava-nābhiḥ stana-bhara-namitā śubhra-vastrottarīyā||
yā lakṣmīrdivya-rūpairmaṇi-gaṇa-khacitaiḥ svāpitā hema-kumbhaiḥ|
sā nityaṃ padmahastā mama vasatu gṛhe sarva-māṅgalya-yuktā||
Gambhirartav-Nabhih Stana-Bhara-Namita Shubhra-Vasttariya|
Sa Nityam Padma-Hasta Mam Vasatu Grihe Sarva-Maangalya-Yukta||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-avaha:
āgaccha devi deveśi! tejomayi mahā-lakṣmi!
kriyamāṇāṃ mayā pūjāṃ gṛhāṇa suravandite!
|| śrīlakṣmī-devīm āvāhayāmi ||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devim Aavahayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-pushp:
nānā-ratna-samāyuktaṃ kārta-svara-vibhūṣitam|
āsanaṃ devi deveśi! prītyarthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai āsanārthe pañca-puṣpāṇi samarpayāmi ||
Nana-Ratna-Samayuktam Karta-Swara-Vibhushitam|
Asanam Devi Deveshi! Prityartham Prati-Grihyatam||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Asanarthe Pancha-Pushpani Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-padya:
pādyaṃ gṛhāṇa deveśi sarva-kṣema-samarthe bhoḥ!
bhaktyā samarpitaṃ devi mahālakṣmi! namo'stu te||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi ||
Bhaktya Samarpitam Devi Mahalakshmi! Namoastu Te||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Padyam Namah ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-arghy:
namaste devi deveśi! namaste kamala-dhāriṇi!
gṛhāṇārghyaṃ mayā dattaṃ mahālakṣmi namo'stu te|
gandha-puṣpākṣatairyuktaṃ phala-dravya-samanvitam|
gṛhāṇa toyamarghyarthaṃ parameśvari vatsale!
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ arghyaṃ samarpayāmi ||
Ghrihanarghyam Maya Dattam Mahalakshmi Namoastu Te|
Gandha-Pushpakshatairyuktam Phala-Dravya-Samanvitam||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Arghyam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-snana:
gaṅgāsarasvatīrevāpayoṣṇīnarmadājalaiḥ|
snāpitāsi mayā devi tathā śāntiṃ kuruṣva me||
ādityavarṇe tapaso'dhijāto vanaspatistava vṛkṣo'tha bilvaḥ|
tasya phalāni tapasā nudantu māyāntarāyāśca bāhyā alakṣmīḥ!
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ jalasnānaṃ samarpayāmi ||
Gangasaraswatirevapayoshninarmadajalaih|
Snapitasi Maya Devi Tatha Shantim Kurushva Me||
Adityavarne Tapasoadhijato Vanaspatistava Vrikshoatha Bilvah|
Tasya Phalani Tapasa Nudantu Mayantarayashcha Bahya Alakshmih|
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Jalasnanam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-panch:
dadhi madhu ghṛtañcaiva payaśca śarkarāyutam|
pañcāmṛtaṃ samānītaṃ snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ pañcanadyaḥ sarasvatīmapiyanti sasrotasaḥ|
sarasvatī tu pañcadhā sodeśe bhavat sarit||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ pañcāmṛtasnānaṃ samarpayāmi ||
Dadhi Madhu Ghritanchaiva Payashcha Sharkarayutam|
Panchamritam Samanitam Snanartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Panchanadyah Saraswatimapiyanti Sasrotasah|
Saraswati Tu Panchadha Sodeshe Bhavat Sarit||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Panchamritasnanam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-gandh:
oṃ malayācalasambhūtaṃ candanāgarusambhavam|
candanaṃ devi deveśi snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ gandhasnānaṃ samarpayāmi ||
Om Malayachalasambhutam Chandanagarusambhavam|
Chandanam Devi Deveshi Snanartham Pratigrihyatam||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Gandhasnanam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-shudd:
mandākinyāstu yadvāri sarvapāpaharaṃ śubham|
tadidaṃ kalpitaṃ tubhyaṃ snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ śuddhodakasnānaṃ samarpayāmi ||
Mandakinyastu Yadvari Sarvapapaharam Shubham|
Tadidam Kalpitam Tubhyam Snanartham Pratigrihyatam||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Shuddhodakasnanam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-vastr:
divyāmbaraṃ nūtanaṃ hi kṣaumaṃ tvatimanoharam|
dīyamānaṃ mayā devi gṛhāṇa jagadambike||
upaitu māṃ devasakhaḥ kīrtiśca maṇinā saha|
prādurbhūto surāṣṭre'smin kīrtimṛddhiṃ dadātu me||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ vastraṃ samarpayāmi ||
Divyambaram Nutanam Hi Kshaumam Tvatimanoharam|
Diyamanam Maya Devi Grihana Jagadambike||
Upaitu Mam Devasakhah Kirtishcha Manina Saha|
Pradurbhuto Surashtreasmin Kirtimriddhim Dadatu Me||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Vastram Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-madhu:
oṃ kāpilaṃ dadhi kundendudhavalaṃ madhusaṃyutam|
svarṇapātrasthitaṃ devi madhuparkaṃ gṛhāṇa bhoḥ||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ madhuparkaṃ samarpayāmi ||
Om Kapilam Dadhi Kundendudhavalam Madhusamyutam|
Swarnapatrasthitam Devi Madhuparkam Grihana Bhoh||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Madhuparkam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-abhus:
ratnakaṅkaṇa-vaidūryamuktāhārayutāni ca|
suprasannena manasā dattāni svīkuruṣva me||
kṣutpipāsāmalāṃ jyeṣṭhāmalakṣmīṃ nāśayāmyaham|
abhūtimasamṛddhiṃ ca sarvānnirṇuda me gṛhāt||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ ābhūṣaṇāni samarpayāmi ||
Ratnakankana-vaiduryamuktaharayutani Cha|
Suprasannena Manasa Dattani Swikurushwa Me||
Kshuptipapasamalam Jyeshthamalakshmim Nashayamyaham|
Abhutimasamriddhim Cha Sarvannirnuda Me Grihat||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Abhushanani Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-rakta:
oṃ raktacandanasammiśraṃ pārijātasamudbhavam|
mayā dattaṃ gṛhāṇāśu candanaṃ gandhasaṃyutam||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ ābhūṣaṇāni samarpayāmi ||
Maya Dattam Grihanashu Chandanam Gandhasamyutam||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Raktachandanam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-sindu:
oṃ sindūraṃ raktavarṇañca sindūratilakapriye|
bhaktyā dattaṃ mayā devi sindūraṃ pratigṛhyatām||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ sindūraṃ samarpayāmi ||
Om Sinduram Raktavarnancha Sinduratilakapriye|
Bhaktya Dattam Maya Devi Sinduram Pratigrihyatam||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Sinduram Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-kumku:
oṃ kuṅkumaṃ kāmadaṃ divyaṃ kuṅkumaṃ kāmarūpiṇam|
akhaṇḍakāmasaubhāgyaṃ kuṅkumaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ kuṅkumaṃ samarpayāmi ||
Om Kumkumam Kamadam Divyam Kumkumam Kamarupinam|
Akhandakamasaubhagyam Kumkumam Pratigrihyatam||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Kumkumam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-abira:
abīrañca gulālaṃ ca covā-candanameva ca|
śrṛṅgārārthaṃ mayā dattaṃ gṛhāṇa parameśvari||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ abīragulālaṃ samarpayāmi ||
Abirancha Gulalam Cha Chova-Chandanameva Cha|
Shringarartham Maya Dattam Grihana Parameshwari||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Abiragulalam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-sugan:
oṃ tailāni ca sugandhīni dravyāṇi vividhāni ca|
mayā dattāni lepārthaṃ gṛhāṇa parameśvari||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ sugandhitatailaṃ samarpayāmi ||
Om Tailani Cha Sugandhini Dravyani Vividhani Cha|
Maya Dattani Lepartham Grihana Parameshwari||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Sugandhitatailam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-aksha:
akṣatāśca suraśreṣṭhe kuṅkumāktāḥ suśobhitāḥ|
mayā niveditā bhaktyā pūjārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ akṣatān samarpayāmi ||
Akshatashcha Surashreshthe Kumkumaktah Sushobhitah|
Maya Nivedita Bhaktya Pujartham Pratigrihyatam||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Akshatan Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-chand:
śrīkhaṇḍaṃ candanaṃ divyaṃ gandhāḍhyaṃ sumanoharam|
vilepanaṃ mahālakṣmi! candanaṃ prati-gṛhyatām||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ candanaṃ samarpayāmi ||
Shrikhandam Chandanam Divyam Gandhadhyam Sumanoharam|
Vilepanam Mahalakshmi! Chandanam Prati-Grihyataam||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Chandanam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-pushp:
yathāprāpta-ṛtupuṣpaiḥ bilva-tulasī-dalairapi|
pūjayāmi mahā-lakṣmi! prasīda me sureśvari!
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ puṣpaṃ samarpayāmi ||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Pushpam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-anga-:
oṃ capalāyai namaḥ pādau pūjayāmi|
oṃ cañcalāyai namaḥ jānunī pūjayāmi|
oṃ kamalāyai namaḥ kaṭiṃ pūjayāmi|
oṃ kātyāyanyai namaḥ nābhiṃ pūjayāmi|
oṃ jaganmātre namaḥ jaṭharaṃ pūjayāmi|
oṃ viśva-vallabhāyai namaḥ vakṣa-sthalaṃ pūjayāmi|
oṃ kamala-vāsinyai namaḥ hastau pūjayāmi|
oṃ kamala-patrākṣyai namaḥ netra-trayaṃ pūjayāmi|
oṃ śriyai namaḥ śiraḥ pūjayāmi|
Om Chapalayai Namah Padau Pujayami|
Om Chanchalayai Namah Januni Pujayami|
Om Kamalayai Namah Katim Pujayami|
Om Katyayanyai Namah Nabhim Pujayami|
Om Jaganmatre Namah Jatharam Pujayami|
Om Vishwa-Vallabhayai Namah Vaksha-Sthalam Pujayami|
Om Kamala-Vasinyai Namah Hastau Pujayami|
Om Kamala-Patrakshyai Namah Netra-Trayam Pujayami|
Om Shriyai Namah Shirah Pujayami|
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-ashta:
oṃ aṇimne namaḥ|
oṃ mahimne namaḥ|
oṃ garimṇe namaḥ|
oṃ laghimne namaḥ|
oṃ prāptyai namaḥ|
oṃ prākāmyai namaḥ|
oṃ īśitāyai namaḥ|
oṃ vaśitāyai namaḥ|
Om Animne Namah|
Om Mahimne Namah|
Om Garimne Namah|
Om Laghimne Namah|
Om Praptyai Namah|
Om Prakamyai Namah|
Om Ishitayai Namah|
Om Vashitayai Namah|
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ashta-lakshmi:
oṃ ādya-lakṣmyai namaḥ|
oṃ vidyā-lakṣmyai namaḥ|
oṃ saubhāgya-lakṣmyai namaḥ|
oṃ amṛta-lakṣmyai namaḥ|
oṃ kamalākṣyai namaḥ|
oṃ satya-lakṣmyai namaḥ|
oṃ bhoga-lakṣmyai namaḥ|
oṃ yoga-lakṣmyai namaḥ|
Om Adya-Lakshmyai Namah|
Om Vidya-Lakshmyai Namah|
Om Saubhagya-Lakshmyai Namah|
Om Amrita-Lakshmyai Namah|
Om Kamalakshyai Namah|
Om Satya-Lakshmyai Namah|
Om Bhoga-Lakshmyai Namah|
Om Yoga-Lakshmyai Namah|
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-dhupa:
vanaspati-rasodbhūto gandhāḍhyaḥ sumanoharaḥ|
āghreyaḥ sarva-devānāṃ, dhūpo'yaṃ prati-gṛhyatām||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ dhūpaṃ samarpayāmi ||
Vanaspati-Rasodbhuto Gandhadhyah Sumanoharah|
Aghreyah Sarva-Devanam, Dhupoayam Prati-Grihyataam||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Dhupam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-dipa-:
sājyaṃ trivarti-saṃyuktaṃ vahninā yojitaṃ mayā,
dīpaṃ gṛhāṇa deveśi! trailokya-timirāpaham|
bhaktyā dīpaṃ prayacchāmi devyai paramātmane|
trāhi māṃ narakāt ghorāt dīpo'yaṃ prati-gṛhyatām||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ dīpaṃ samarpayāmi ||
Dipam Grihana Deveshi! Trailokya-Timirapaham|
Bhaktya Dipam Prayachchhami Devyai Paramatmane|
Trahi Mam Narakat Ghorat Dipoayam Prati-Grihyataam||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Dipam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-naive:
śarkarā-khaṇḍa-khādyāni dadhi-kṣīra-ghṛtāni ca|
āhāro bhakṣya-bhojyaṃ ca naivedyaṃ prati-gṛhyatām|
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ yathāṃśataḥ śrīlakṣmī-devyai naivedyaṃ samarpayāmi -
oṃ prāṇāya svāhā|
oṃ apānāya svāhā|
oṃ samānāya svāhā|
oṃ udānāya svāhā|
oṃ vyānāya svāhā ||
Sharkara-Khanda-Khadyani Dadhi-Kshira-Ghritani Cha|
Aaharo Bhakshya-Bhojyam Cha, Naivedyam Prati-Grihyataam|
|| Shri Lakshmyai-Devyai Namah Yathamshatah Shri Lakshmyai-Devyai Naivedhyam Samarpayami -
Om Pranaya Swaha|
Om Apanaya Swaha|
Om Samanaya Swaha|
Om Udanaya Swaha|
Om Vyanaya Swaha||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-acham:
tataḥ pānīyaṃ samarpayāmi iti uttarāpoṣaṇam|
hasta-prakṣālanaṃ samarpayāmi| mukha-prakṣālanaṃ|
karodvartanārthe candanaṃ samarpayāmi|
Tatah Paniyam Samarpayami Iti Uttaraposhanam|
Hasta-Prakshalanam Samarpayami| Mukh-Prakshalanam|
Karodvartanarthe Chandanam Samarpayami|
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-tambu:
pūgīphalaṃ mahaddivyaṃ nāgavallī-dalairyutam|
karpūrailā-samāyuktaṃ tāmbūlaṃ prati-gṛhyatām||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ mukha-vāsārthaṃ pūgī-phalayuktaṃ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi ||
Pugiphalam Mahaddivyam Nagavalli-Dalairyutam|
Karpuraila-Samayuktam Tambulam Prati-Grihyataam||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Mukha-Vasartham Pugi-Phalayuktam Tambulam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-daksh:
hiraṇya-garbhagarbhasthaṃ hemabījaṃ vibhāvasoḥ|
anantapuṇya-phaladamataḥ śāntiṃ prayaccha me||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ suvarṇapuṣpa-dakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi ||
Hiranya-Garbhagarbhastham Hemabijam Vibhavasoh|
Anantapunya-Phaladamatah Shantim Prayachchha Me||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Suvarnapushpa-Dakshinam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-prada:
yāni kāni ca pāpāni janmāntara-kṛtāni ca|
tāni tāni vinaśyanti pradakṣiṇāṃ pade pade||
anyathā śaraṇaṃ nāsti tvameva śaraṇaṃ mama|
tasmāt kāruṇya-bhāvena, kṣamasva parameśvari||
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ pradakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi ||
Yani Kani Cha Papani Janmantara-Kritani Cha|
Tani Tani Vinashyanti, Pradakshinam Pade Pade||
Anyatha Sharanam Nasti, Tvameva Sharanam Mama|
Tasmat karunya-Bhavena, Kshamasva Parameshwari||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Pradakshinam Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-vanda:
karakṛtaṃ vā kāyajaṃ karmajaṃ vā,
śravaṇa-nayanajaṃ vā mānasaṃ vā'parādham|
viditamaviditaṃ vā sarvametat kṣamasva,
jaya jaya karuṇābdhe, śrīmahā-lakṣmi trāhi|
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai namaḥ mantra-puṣpāñjaliṃ samarpayāmi ||
Shravana-Nayanajam Va Manasam Vaparadham|
Jaya Jaya Karunabdhe, Shri Maha-Lakshmi Trahi|
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Mantra-Pushpanjalim Samarpayami ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-sasht:
oṃ bhavāni! tvaṃ mahā-lakṣmīḥ sarva-kāma-pradāyinī|
prasannā santuṣṭā bhava devi! lakṣmyai namo'stu te|
|| anena pūjanena śrīlakṣmī devī prīyatāṃ namo namaḥ||
Om Bhavani! Tvam Maha-Lakshmih Sarva-Kama-Pradayini|
Prasannaa Santushta Bhava Devi! Lakshmyai Namoastu Te|
|| Anena Pujanena Shrilakshmi Devi Priyatam Namo Namah ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-lakshmi-ksham:
āvāhanaṃ na jānāmi na jānāmi visarjanam||
pūjā-karma na jānāmi kṣamasva parameśvari||
mantrahīnaṃ kriyāhīnaṃ bhakti-hīnaṃ sureśvari!
mayā yatpūjitaṃ devi! paripūrṇaṃ tadastu me||
anena yathā-militopacāra-dravyaiḥ kṛta-pūjanena śrīlakṣmī-devī prīyatām
|| śrīlakṣmī-devyai arpaṇamastu ||
Avahanam Na janami Na Janami Visarjanam||
Puja-Karma Na Janami, Kshamasva Parameshwari||
Maya Yatpujitam Devi! Paripurnam Tadastu Me||
|| Shri Lakshmi-Devyai Namah Arpanamastu ||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-dhyan:
udyad-dineśvara-ruciṃ nija-hasta-padmaiḥ,
pāśāṃkuśābhaya-varān dadhataṃ gajāsyam|
raktāmbaraṃ sakala-duḥkhaharaṃ gaṇeśam,
dhyāye prasannamakhilābharaṇābhirāmam||
Pashankushabhaya-Varan Dadhatam Gajasyam|
Dhyaye Prasannamakhilabharanabhiramam||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-avaha:
āgaccha deva-deveśa! tejorāśe gaṇapate!
kriyamāṇāṃ mayā pūjāṃ gṛhāṇa sura-sattama!
||śrīmad-gaṇapati-devam āvāhayāmi||
||Shrimad-Ganapati-Devam Avahayami||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-pushp:
nānāratna-samāyuktaṃ kārta-svara-vibhūṣitam|
āsanaṃ deva deveśa! prītyarthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
||śrīgaṇeśa-devāya namaḥ āsanārthe pañca-puṣpāṇi samarpayāmi||
Nanaratna-Samayuktam Karta-Svara-Vibhushitam|
Asanam Deva Devesha! Prityartham Pratigrihyatam||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Asanarthe Pancha-Pushpani Samarpayami||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-padya:
pādyaṃ gṛhāṇa deveśa sarvakṣemasamartha bhoḥ!
bhaktyā samarpitaṃ deva gaṇapate! namo'stu te||
||śrīgaṇeśa-devāya namaḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi||
Bhaktya Samarpitam Deva GanaPate! Namoastu Te||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Padyam Samarpayami||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-arghy:
namaste deva deveśa! namaste dharaṇī-dhara!
namaste sarvanāgendra namaste puruṣottama|
gandha-puṣpākṣatairyuktaṃ phala-dravya-samanvitam|
gṛhāṇa toyamarghyarthaṃ parameśvara vatsala!
||śrīgaṇeśa-devāya namaḥ arghyaṃ samarpayāmi||
Namaste Sarvanagendra Namaste Purushottama|
Gandha-Pushpakshatairyuktam Phala-Dravya-Samanvitam||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Arghyam Samarpayami||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-chand:
śrīkhaṇḍaṃ candanaṃ divyaṃ gandhāḍhyaṃ sumanoharam|
vilepanaṃ gaṇapate! candanaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
||śrīgaṇeśa-devāya namaḥ candanaṃ samarpayāmi||
Shrikhandam Chandanam Divyam Gandhadhyam Sumanoharam|
Vilepanam Ganapate! Chandanam Pratigrihyatam||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Chandanam Samarpayami||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-pushp:
yathā-prāpta-ṛtu-puṣpaiḥ bilva-tulasī-dalaiśca|
pūjayāmi gaṇapate! prasīda me sureśvara!
||śrīgaṇeśa-devāya puṣpaṃ samarpayāmi||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Pushpam Samarpayami||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-dhupa:
vanaspati-rasodbhūto gandhāḍhyaḥ sumanoharaḥ|
āghreyaḥ sarva-devānāṃ dhūpo'yaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
||śrīgaṇeśa-devāya namaḥ dhūpam āghrāpayāmi||
Vanaspati-Rasodbhuto Gandhadhyah Sumanoharah|
Aghreyah Sarva-Devanam Dhupoayam Pratigrihyatam||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Dhupam Aghrapayami||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-dipa-:
sājyaṃ trivarti-saṃyuktaṃ vahninā yojitaṃ mayā,
dīpaṃ gṛhāṇa deveśa! trailokya-timirāpaham|
bhaktyā dīpaṃ prayacchāmi devāya paramātmane|
trāhi māṃ narakāt ghorāddīpo'yaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
||śrīgaṇeśa-devāya namaḥ dīpaṃ darśayāmi||
Dipam Grihana Devesha! Trailokya-Timirapaham|
Bhaktya Dipam Prayachchhami Devaya Paramatmane|
Trahi Mam Narakat Ghoraddipoayam Pratigrihyatam||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Dipam Darshayami||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-naive:
śarkarā-khaṇḍa-khādyāni dadhi-kṣīra-ghṛtāni ca|
āhāro bhakṣya-bhojyaṃ ca naivedyaṃ pratigṛhyatām|
|| śrīgaṇeśa-devāya namaḥ yathāṃśataḥ śrīgaṇeśa-devāya naivedyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ prāṇāya svāhā|
oṃ apānāya svāhā|
oṃ samānāya svāhā|
oṃ udānāya svāhā|
oṃ vyānāya svāhā||
Sharkara-Khanda-Khadyani Dadhi-Kshira-Ghritani Cha|
Aharo Bhakshya-Bhojyam Cha Naivedyam Pratigrihyatam|
|| Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Yathamshatah Shriganesha-Devaya Naivedyam Samarpayami -
Om Pranaya Swaha|
Om Apanaya Swaha|
Om Samanaya Swaha|
Om Udanaya Swaha|
Om Vyanaya Swaha||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-acham:
tataḥ pānīyaṃ samarpayāmi iti uttarāpoṣaṇam|
hasta-prakṣālanaṃ samarpayāmi| mukha-prakṣālanam|
karodvartanārthe candanaṃ samarpayāmi|
Tatah Paniyam Samarpayami Iti Uttaraposhanam|
Hasta-Prakshalanam Samarpayami| Mukha-Prakshalanam|
Karodvartanarthe Chandanam Samarpayami|
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-tambu:
pūgīphalaṃ mahaddivyaṃ nāgavallīdalairyutam|
karpūrailāsamāyuktaṃ tāmbūlaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
||śrīgaṇeśa-devāya namaḥ mukhavāsārthaṃ pūgīphala-yuktaṃ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi||
Pugiphalam Mahaddivyam Nagavallidalairyutam|
Karpurailasamayuktam Tambulam Pratigrihyatam||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Mukha-Vasartham Pugiphala-Yuktam Tambulam Samarpayami||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-daksh:
hiraṇyagarbha-garbhasthaṃ hemabījaṃ vibhāvasoḥ|
anantapuṇya-phaladamataḥ śāntiṃ prayaccha me||
||śrīgaṇeśa-devāya namaḥ suvarṇa-puṣpa-dakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi||
Hiranyagarbha-Garbhastham Hemabijam Vibhavasoh|
Anantapunya-Phaladamatah Shantim Prayachchha Me||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Suvarna-Pushpa-Dakshinam Samarpayami||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-prada:
yāni kāni ca pāpāni janmāntara-kṛtāni ca|
tāni tāni vinaśyanti pradakṣiṇāṃ pade pade||
anyathā śaraṇaṃ nāsti tvameva śaraṇaṃ prabho!
tasmāt kāruṇya-bhāvena kṣamasva parameśvara||
||śrīgaṇeśa-devāya namaḥ pradakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi||
Yani Kani Cha Papani Janmantara-Kritani Cha|
Tani Tani Vinashyanti Pradakshinam Pade Pade||
Tasmat Karunya-Bhavena Kshamasva Parameshwara||
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Pradakshinam Samarpayami||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-vanda:
karacaraṇakṛtaṃ vākkāyajaṃ karmajaṃ vā,
śravaṇa-nayanajaṃ vā mānasaṃ vā'parādham|
viditamaviditaṃ vā sarvametat kṣamasva,
jaya jaya karuṇābdhe śrīgaṇapate! trāhi|
||śrīgaṇeśa-devāya namaḥ mantra-puṣpaṃ samarpayāmi||
Shravana-Nayanajam Va Manasam Vaaparadham|
Jaya Jaya Karunabdhe Shri Ganapate! Trahi|
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Mantra-Pushpam Samarpayami||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-sasht:
namaḥ sarva-hitārthāya jagadādhāra-hetave|
sāṣṭāṅgo'yaṃ supraṇāmaḥ prayatnena mayā kṛtaḥ||
namo'stvanantāya sahasra-mūrtaye sahasra-pādākṣi-śiroru-bāhave|
||śrīgaṇeśa-devāya namaḥ sāṣṭāṅga-praṇāmaṃ samarpayāmi||
Namah Sarva-Hitarthaya Jagadadhara-Hetave|
Sashtangoayam Supranamah Prayatnena Maya Kritah||
Namoastvanantaya Sahasra-Murtaye Sahasra-Padakshi-Shiroru-Bahave|
||Shriganesha-Devaya Namah Sashtanga-Pranamam Samarpayami||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-ksham:
Avahanam Na Janami Na Janami Visarjanam|
Pujakarma Na Janami Kshamasva Parameshwara||
Maya Yatpujitam Deva! Paripurnam Tadastu Me||
Aparadhasahasrani Kriyanteaharnisham Maya|
Dasoayamiti Mam Matva Kshamasva Parameshwara|
Vidhehi Deva! Kalyanam Vidhehi Vipulam Shriyam|
Rupam Dehi Jayam Dehi Yasho Dehi Dwisho Jahi||
Yasya Smritya Cha Namoktya Tapo-Yajna-Kriyadishu|
Nunam Sampurnatam Yati Sadyo Vande Tamachyutam||
Anena Yatha-Militopachara-Dravyaih Krita-Pujanena Shriganesha-Devah Priyatam|
||Shriganesha-Devarpanamastu||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:shri-ganesha-raksh:
oṃ rakṣa rakṣa gaṇādhyakṣa! rakṣa trailokya-rakṣaka!
bhaktānāmabhayaṃ karttā! trātā bhava bhavārṇavāt|
||anena pūjanena śrīgaṇeśaḥ ṛddhi-siddhi-sahitaḥ prīyatām, namo namaḥ||
Bhaktanamabhayam Kartta! Trata Bhava Bhavarnavat|
||Anena Pujanena Shriganeshah Riddhi-Siddhi-Sahitah Priyatam, Namo Namah||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:mahalakshmi-mantra:
oṃ śrīṃ hrīṃ śrīṃ kamale kamalālaye prasīda prasīda
oṃ śrīṃ hrīṃ śrīṃ mahālakṣmayai nama:||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:lakshmi-gayatri-ma: oṃ mahālakṣmyai ca vidmahe viṣṇupatnyai ca dhīmahi tanno lakṣmīḥ pracodayāt||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:dhan-prapti-mantra: oṃ hrīṃ śrīṃ krīṃ śrīṃ krīṃ klīṃ śrīṃ mahālakṣmī mama gṛhe dhanaṃ pūraya pūraya cintāyai dūraya dūraya svāhā||
mantra:lakshmi-ganesh:ganesha-visarjan-s:
mūṣikavāhana modakahasta
cāmarakarṇa vilambitasūtra |
vāmanarūpa mahesvaraputra
vighnavināyaka pāda namaste ||
mantra:maha-mrityunjaya:maha-mrityunjaya:
oṃ tryambakaṃ yajāmahe
sugandhiṃ puṣṭivardhanam |
urvārukamiva bandhanān
mṛtyormukṣīya māmṛtāt ||
mantra:maha-shivaratri:lord-shiva-chalis:
Jai Girija Pati Dinadayala|
Sada Karata Santana Pratipala||
Bhala Chandrama Sohata Nike|
Kanana Kundala Nagaphani Ke||
mantra:maha-shivaratri:lord-shiva-aarti-:
Swami Jai Shiv Omkara|
Ardhangi Dhara||
Om Jai Shiv Omkara||
mantra:maha-shivaratri:shiva-ramashtakam:
Trividhatapa-nivarana He Vibho|
Shiva Hare Vijayam Kuru Me Varam||1||
mantra:mangal-bhat:mangal-patha-mantra-1:
sumukhaścaikadantaśca kapilo gajakarṇakaḥ|
lambodaraśca vikaṭo vighnanāśo vināyakaḥ||
Sumukhashchaikadantashcha Kapilo Gajakarnakah|
Lambodarashcha Vikato Vighnanasho Vinayakah||
mantra:mangal-bhat:mangal-patha-mantra-2:
dhūmraketurgaṇādhyakṣo bhālacandro gajānanaḥ|
dvādaśaitāni nāmāni yaḥ paṭhecchṛṇuyādapi||
Dhumraketurganadhyaksho Bhalachandro Gajananah|
Dwadashaitani Namani Yah Pathechchhrinuyadapi||
mantra:mangal-bhat:mangal-patha-mantra-3:
vidyārambhe vivāhe ca videśagamane tathā|
saṃgrāme saṅkaṭe caiva vighnastasya na jāyate||
Vidyarambhe Vivahe Cha Videshagamane Tatha|
Sangrame Sankate Chaiva Vighnastasya Na Jayate||
mantra:mangal-bhat:mangal-patha-mantra-4:
śuklāmbaradharaṃ devaṃ śaśivarṇaṃ caturbhujam|
prasannavadanaṃ dhyāyet sarvavighnopaśāntaye||
Shuklambaradharam Devam Shashivarnam Chaturbhujam|
Prasannavadanam Dhyayet Sarvavighnopashantaye||
mantra:mangal-bhat:mangal-patha-mantra-5:
sarvamaṅgalamāṅgalye śive sarvārthasādhike!
śaraṇye tryambake gauri nārāyaṇi! namo'stu te||
Sharanye Tryambake Gauri Narayani! Namoastu Te||
mantra:mangal-bhat:mangal-patha-mantra-6:
sarvadā sarvakāryeṣu nāsti teṣāmamaṅgalam|
yeṣāṃ hṛdistho bhagavān maṅgalāyatano hariḥ||
Sarvada Sarvakaryeshu Nasti Teshamamangalam|
Yesham Hridistho Bhagawan Mangalayatano Harih ||
mantra:mangal-bhat:mangal-patha-mantra-7:
tadeva lagnaṃ sudinaṃ tadeva tārābalaṃ candrabalaṃ tadeva|
vidyābalaṃ daivabalaṃ tadeva lakṣmīpateraṃghriyugaṃ smarāmi||
Tadeva Lagnam Sudinam Tadeva Tarabalam Chandrabalam Tadeva|
Vidyabalam Daivabalam Tadeva Lakshmipateramghriyugam Smarami||
mantra:mangal-bhat:mangal-patha-mantra-8:
lābhasteṣāṃ jayasteṣāṃ kutasteṣāṃ parājayaḥ|
yeṣāmindīvaraśyāmo hṛdayastho janārdanaḥ||
Labhastesham Jayastesham Kutastesham Parajayah|
Yeshamindivarashyamo Hridayastho Janardanah||
mantra:mangal-bhat:mangal-patha-mantra-9:
vināyakaṃ guruṃ bhānuṃ brahmā-viṣṇu-maheśvarān|
sarasvatīṃ praṇamyādau sarva-kāryārtha-siddhaye||
Vinayakam Gurum Bhanum Brahma-Vishnu-Maheshvaran|
Saraswatim Pranamyadau Sarva-Karyartha-Siddhaye||
mantra:mangal-bhat:mangal-patha-mantra-1:
abhīpsitārtha-siddhyarthaṃ pūjito yaḥ surāsuraiḥ|
sarva-vighnacchide tasmai gaṇādhipataye namaḥ||
Abhipsitartha-Siddhyartham Pujito Yaḥ Surasuraih|
Sarva-Vighnachchhide Tasmai Ganadhipataye Namah||

sarveṣvārabdha-kāryeṣu trayastri-bhuvaneśvarāḥ|
devāḥ diśantu naḥ siddhiṃ brahmeśāna-janārdanāḥ||
Sarveshvarabdha-Karyeshu Trayastri-Bhuvaneshvarah|
Devah Dishantu Nah Siddhim Brahmeshana-Janardanah||
