mantra:narayan-bali:arghyam:
vyaktāvyaktasvarūpāya hṛṣīkapataye namaḥ|
mayā nivedito bhaktyā arghyo'yaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ arghyaṃ samarpayāmi|
Vyaktavyaktasvarupaya Hrishikapataye Namah|
Maya Nivedito Bhaktya Arghyoayam Pratigrihyatam||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Arghyam Samarpayami|
mantra:narayan-bali:achamaniyam:
mandākinyāstu yadvāri sarvapāpaharaṃ śubham|
tadidaṃ kalpitaṃ deva samyagācamyatāṃ vibho||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ ācamanīyaṃ samarpayāmi|
Mandakinyastu Yadvari Sarvapapa Haram Shubham|
Tadidam Kalpitam Deva Samyagachamyatam Vibho||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Achamaniyam Samarpayami|
mantra:narayan-bali:shuddhodaka-snanam:
nānātīrthasamānītaṃ sarvapāpaharaṃ śubham|
tadidaṃ kalpitaṃ deva snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ śuddhodakasnānaṃ samarpayāmi|
Nanatirthasamanitam Sarvapapa Haram Shubham|
Tadidam Kalpitam Deva Snanartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Shuddhodaka Snanam Samarpayami|
mantra:narayan-bali:yajnopavitam:
brahmāviṣṇumaheśena nirmitaṃ sūtramuttamam|
gṛhāṇa bhagavan viṣṇo sarveṣṭaphalado bhava||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ yajñopavītaṃ samarpayāmi|
Brahmavishnumaheshena Nirmitam Sutramuttamam|
Grihana Bhagawan Vishno Sarveshta Phalado Bhava||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Yajnopavitam Samarpayami|
mantra:narayan-bali:chandanam:
śrīkhaṇḍaṃ candanaṃ divyaṃ gandhāḍhyaṃ sumanoharam|
vilepanaṃ suraśreṣṭha candanaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ candanaṃ samarpayāmi|
Shrikhandam Chandanam Divyam Gandhadhyam Sumanoharam|
Vilepanam Surashreshtha Chandanam Pratigrihyatam||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Chandanam Samarpayami|
mantra:narayan-bali:pushpani:
mālyādīni sugandhīni mālatyādīni vai prabho|
mayā hṛtāni puṣpāṇi pūjārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ puṣpāṇi samarpayāmi|
Malyadini Sugandhini Malatyadini Vai Prabho|
Maya Hritani Pushpani Pujartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Pushpani Samarpayami|
mantra:narayan-bali:dhupah:
vanaspatirasodbhūto gandhāḍhyo gandha uttamaḥ|
āghreyaḥ sarvadevānāṃ dhūpo'yaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ dhūpam āghrāpayāmi|
Vanaspatirasodbhuto Gandhadhyo Gandha Uttamah|
Aghreyah Sarvadevanam Dhupoayam Pratigrihyatam||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Dhupam Aghrapayami|
mantra:narayan-bali:deepah:
sājyaṃ ca vartisaṃyuktaṃ vahninā dīpitaṃ mayā|
dīpaṃ gṛhāṇa deveśa mama saukhyaprado bhava||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ dīpaṃ darśayāmi|
Sajyam Cha Varti Samyuktam Vahnina Deepitam Maya|
Deepam Grihana Devesha Mama Saukhyaprado Bhava||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Deepam Darshayami|
mantra:narayan-bali:tambulam:
lavaṅgakarpūrasaṃyuktaṃ tāmbūlaṃ surapūjitam|
elādicūrṇasaṃyuktaṃ prītyarthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi|
Lavangakarpurasamyuktam Tambulam Sura Pujitam|
Eladichurna Samyuktam Prityartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Tambulam Samarpayami|
mantra:narayan-bali:phalam:
idaṃ phalaṃ mayā deva! sthāpitaṃ puratastava|
tena me saphalāvāptirbhavejjanmani janmani||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ phalaṃ samarpayāmi|
Idam Phalam Maya Deva! Sthapitam Puratastava|
Tena Me Saphalavaptirbhavejjanmani Janmani||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Phalam Samarpayami|
mantra:narayan-bali:arartikya-aarti:
caturvartisamāyuktaṃ goghṛtena ca pūritam|
ārārtikyamahaṃ kurve paśya me varado bhava||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ maṅgala-ārārtikyaṃ samarpayāmi|
Chaturvarti Samayuktam Goghritena Cha Puritam|
Arartikyamaham Kurve Pashya Me Varado Bhava||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Mangala-Arartikyam Samarpayami|
mantra:narayan-bali:pradakshina:
yāni kāni ca pāpāni janmāntarakṛtāni ca|
tāni tāni vinaśyantu pradakṣiṇapade pade||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ pradakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi|
Yani Kani Cha Papani Janmantara Kritani Cha|
Tani Tani Vinashyantu Pradakshina Pade Pade||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Pradakshinam Samarpayami|
mantra:narayan-bali:mantrapushpanjali:
yanmayā bhaktiyuktena patraṃ puṣpaṃ phalaṃ jalam|
niveditaṃ ca naivedyaṃ tadgṛhāṇānukampayā||
mantrahīnaṃ kriyāhīnaṃ bhaktihīnaṃ janārdana|
yatpūjitaṃ mayā deva paripūrṇaṃ tadastu me||
anayā pūjayā śrīviṣṇuḥ prasīdatu||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ puṣpāñjaliṃ samarpayāmi|
Yanmaya Bhakti Yuktena Patram Pushpam Phalam Jalam|
Niveditam Cha Naivedyam Tad Grihananukampaya||
Mantrahinam Kriyahinam Bhaktihinam Janardana|
Yatpujitam Maya Deva Paripurnam Tadastu Me||
Anaya Pujaya Shrivishnuh Prasidatu||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Pushpanjalim Samarpayami|
mantra:narayan-bali:satyanarayana-aarti-:
Shri Jai Lakshmiramana|
Janapataka Harana||
Jai Lakshmiramana...|
mantra:narayan-bali:padyam-arghyam:
nārāyaṇa namaste'stu narakārṇavatāraka |
pādyaṃ gṛhāṇa deveśa mama saukhyaṃ vivardhaya ||
mantra:navagraha-shanti:navagraha-avahan:
oṃ sūrya-candra-maṅgala-budha-bṛhaspati-śukra-śani-rāhu-ketu-nava-grahebhyo namaḥ|
oṃ navagrahāḥ! ihāgacchata, iha tiṣṭhata, mama pūjāṃ gṛhṇīta|
Shukra-Shani-Rahu-Ketu-Nava-Grahebhyo Namah|
Om Nava-Grahah! Ihagachchhata, Iha Tishthata, Mama Pujam Grihnita|
mantra:navagraha-shanti:navagraha-dashop:
oṃ sūryādi-nava-grahebhyo namaḥ pādayoḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ sūryādi-nava-grahebhyo namaḥ śirasi arghyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ sūryādi-nava-grahebhyo namaḥ gandhākṣatān samarpayāmi|
oṃ sūryādi-nava-grahebhyo namaḥ puṣpaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ sūryādi-nava-grahebhyo namaḥ dhūpam āghrāpayāmi|
oṃ sūryādi-nava-grahebhyo namaḥ dīpaṃ darśayāmi|
oṃ sūryādi-nava-grahebhyo namaḥ naivedyaṃ nivedayāmi|
oṃ sūryādi-nava-grahebhyo namaḥ ācamanīyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ sūryādi-nava-grahebhyo namaḥ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ sūryādi-nava-grahebhyo namaḥ dakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi|

Om Suryadi-Nava-Grahebhyo Namah Padayoh Padyam Samarpayami|
Om Suryadi-Nava-Grahebhyo Namah Shirasi Arghyam Samarpayami|
Om Suryadi-Nava-Grahebhyo Namah Gandhakshatan Samarpayami|
Om Suryadi-Nava-Grahebhyo Namah Pushpam Samarpayami|
Om Suryadi-Nava-Grahebhyo Namah Dhupam Aghrapayami|
Om Suryadi-Nava-Grahebhyo Namah Dipam Darshayami|
Om Suryadi-Nava-Grahebhyo Namah Naivedyam Nivedayami|
Om Suryadi-Nava-Grahebhyo Namah Achamaniyam Samarpayami|
Om Suryadi-Nava-Grahebhyo Namah Tambulam Samarpayami|
mantra:navagraha-shanti:navagraha-prarth:
brahmā-murāristripurānta-kārī bhānuḥ śaśī bhūmisuto budhaśca|
guruśca śukraḥ śani-rāhu-ketavaḥ sarve grahāḥ śāntikarā bhavantu||
Brahma-Muraristripuranta-Kari Bhanuh Shashi Bhumisuto budhashcha|
Gurushcha Shukrah Shani-Rahu-Ketavah Sarve Grahah Shantikara Bhavantu||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-dhyana-and-av:
sarvamaṅgalamāṅgalye śive sarvārthasādhike|
śaraṇye tryambake gauri nārāyaṇi namo'stu te||
brahmarūpe sadānande paramānandasvarūpiṇi|
drutasiddhiprade devi nārāyaṇi namo'stu te||
śaraṇāgatadīnārtaparitrāṇaparāyaṇe|
sarvasyārttihare devi nārāyaṇi namo'stu te||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ durgādevīm āvāhayāmi||
Sarvamangalamangalye Shive Sarvarthasadhike|
Sharanye Tryambake Gauri Narayani Namoastu Te||
Brahmarupe Sadanande Paramanandasvarupini|
Drutasiddhiprade Devi Narayani Namoastu Te||
Sharanagatadinartaparitranaparayane|
Sarvasyarttihare Devi Narayani Namoastu Te||
Durgadevim Avahayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-asana-mantra:
anekaratnasaṃyuktaṃ nānāmaṇigaṇānvitam|
kārtasvaramayaṃ divyamāsanaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ āsanaṃ kalpayāmi||
Anekaratnasamyuktam Nanamanigananvitam|
Kartasvaramayam Divyamasanam Pratigrihyatam||
Asanam Kalpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-padya-praksha:
gaṅgādisarvatīrthebhyo mayā prārthanayāhṛtam|
toyametatsukhasparśaṃ pādyārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi||
Gangadisarvatirthebhyo Maya Prarthanayahritam|
Toyametatsukhasparsham Padyartham Pratigrihyatam||
Padyam Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-arghya-samarp:
gandhapuṣpākṣatairyuktamarghyaṃ sampāditaṃ mayā|
gṛhāṇa tvaṃ mahādevi prasannā bhava sarvadā||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ arghyaṃ samarpayāmi||
Gandhapushpakshatairyuktamarghyam Sampaditam Maya|
Grihana Tvam Mahadevi Prasanna Bhava Sarvada||
Arghyam Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-achamana-sama:
ācamyatāṃ tvayā devi bhaktiṃ me hyacalāṃ kuru|
īpsitaṃ me varaṃ dehi paratra ca parāṃ gatim||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ ācamanīyaṃ jalaṃ samarpayāmi||
Achamyatam Tvaya Devi Bhaktim Me Hyachalam Kuru|
Ipsitam Me Varam Dehi Paratra Cha Param Gatim||
Achamaniyam Jalam Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-snana-mantra:
payodadhi ghṛtaṃ kṣīraṃ sitayā ca samanvitam|
pañcāmṛtamanenādya kuru snānaṃ dayānidhe||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ snānīyaṃ jalaṃ samarpayāmi||
Payodadhi Ghritam Kshiram Sitaya Cha Samanvitam|
Panchamritamanenadya Kuru Snanam Dayanidhe||
Snaniyam Jalam Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-vastra-samarp:
vastraṃ ca somadaivatyaṃ lajjāyāstu nivāraṇam|
mayā niveditaṃ bhaktyā gṛhāṇa parameśvari||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ vastraṃ samarpayāmi||
Vastram Cha Somadaivatyam Lajjayastu Nivaranam|
Maya Niveditam Bhaktya Grihana Parameshwari||
Vastram Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-abhushana-sam:
hārakaṅkaṇakeyūra-mekhalākuṇḍalādibhiḥ|
ratnāḍhyaṃ kuṇḍalopetaṃ bhūṣaṇaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ ābhūṣaṇaṃ samarpayāmi||
Harakankanakeyura-Mekhalakundaladibhih|
Ratnadhyam Kundalopetam Bhushanam Pratigrihyatam||
Abhushanam Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-chandana-sama:
paramānandasaubhāgyaṃ paripūrṇaṃ digantare|
gṛhāṇa paramaṃ gandhaṃ kṛpayā parameśvari||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ candanaṃ vilepayāmi||
Paramanandasaubhagyam Paripurnam Digantare|
Grihana Paramam Gandham Kripaya Parameshwari||
Chandanam Vilepayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-kumkuma-samar:
kuṅkumaṃ kāntidaṃ divyaṃ kāminīkāmasambhavam|
kuṅkumenārcite devi prasīda parameśvari||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ kuṅkumaṃ samarpayāmi||
Kumkumam Kantidam Divyam Kaminikamasambhavam|
Kumkumenarchite Devi Prasida Parameshwari||
Kumkumam Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-kajjala-samar:
kajjalaṃ kajjalaṃ ramyaṃ subhage śāntikārike|
karpūrajyotirutpannaṃ gṛhāṇa parameśvari||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ kajjalaṃ samarpayāmi||
Kajjalam Kajjalam Ramyam Subhage Shantikarike|
Karpurajyotirutpannam Grihana Parameshwari||
Kajjalam Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-saubhagya-sut:
saubhāgyasūtraṃ varade suvarṇamaṇisaṃyute|
kaṇṭhe badhnāmi deveśi saubhāgyaṃ dehi me sadā||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ saubhāgyasūtraṃ badhnāmi||
Saubhagyasutram Varade Suvarnamanisamyute|
Kanthe Badhnami Deveshi Saubhagyam Dehi Me Sada||
Saubhagyasutram Badhnami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-sugandhita-dr:
candanāgarukarpūraiḥ saṃyutaṃ kuṅkumaṃ tathā|
kastūryādisugandhāśca sarvāṅgeṣu vilepanam||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ sugandhitadravyaṃ vilepayāmi||
Chandanagarukarpuraih Samyutam Kunkumam Tatha|
Kasturyadisugandhashcha Sarvangeshu Vilepanam||
Sugandhitadravyam Vilepayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-haridra-samar:
haridrārañjite devi sukhasaubhāgyadāyinī|
tasmāttvāṃ pūjayāmyatra sukhaśāntiṃ prayaccha me||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ haridrācūrṇaṃ samarpayāmi||
Haridraranjite Devi Sukhasaubhagyadayini|
Tasmattvam Pujayamyatra Sukhashantim Prayaccha Me||
Haridrachurnam Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-akshata-samar:
rañjitāḥ kuṅkumaudyena na akṣatāścātiśobhanāḥ|
mamaiṣāṃ devi dānena prasannā bhava śobhane||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ akṣatān samarpayāmi||
Ranjitah Kunkumaudyena Na Akshatashchatishobhanah|
Mamaisham Devi Danena Prasanna Bhava Shobhane||
Akshatan Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-pushpanjali-m:
mandārapārijātādi-pāṭalīketakāni ca|
jātīcampakapuṣpāṇi gṛhāṇemāni śobhane||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ puṣpāñjaliṃ samarpayāmi||
Mandaraparijatadi-Pataliketakani Cha|
Jatichampakapushpani Grihanemani Shobhane||
Pushpanjalim Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-bilvapatra-ma:
amṛtodbhava-śrīvṛkṣo mahādevi! priyaḥ sadā|
bilvapatraṃ prayacchāmi pavitraṃ te sureśvari||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ bilvapatrāṇi samarpayāmi||
Amritodbhava-Shrivriksho Mahadevi! Priyah Sada|
Bilvapatram Prayacchami Pavitram Te Sureshwari||
Bilvapatrani Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-dhupa-samarpa:
daśāṅgaguggulaṃ dhūpaṃ candanāgarusaṃyutam|
samarpitaṃ mayā bhaktyā mahādevi! pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ dhūpamāghrāpayami|
Dashangaguggulam Dhupam Chandanagarusamyutam|
Samarpitam Maya Bhaktya Mahadevi! Pratigrihyatam||
Dhupamaghrapayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-dipa-samarpan:
ghṛtavarttisamāyuktaṃ mahātejo mahojjvalam|
dīpaṃ dāsyāmi deveśi! suprītā bhava sarvadā||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ dīpaṃ darśayāmi|
Ghritavarttisamayuktam Mahatejo Mahojjvalam|
Dipam Dasyami Deveshi! Suprita Bhava Sarvada||
Dipam Darshayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-naivedya-sama:
annaṃ caturvidhaṃ svādu rasaiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ samanvitam|
naivedyaṃ gṛhyatāṃ devi! bhaktiṃ me hyacalāṃ kuru||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ naivedyaṃ nivedayāmi|
Annam Chaturvidham Svadu Rasaih Shadbhih Samanvitam|
Naivedyam Grihyatam Devi! Bhaktim Me Hyachalam Kuru||
Naivedyam Nivedayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-rituphala-man:
drākṣākharjūrakadalī-phalasāmrakapitthakam|
nārikelekṣujambvādi-phalāni pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ ṛtuphalāni samarpayāmi||
Drakshakharjurakadali-Phalasamrakapitthakam|
Narikelekshujambvadi-Phalani Pratigrihyatam||
Rituphalani Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-achamana-mant:
kāmārivallabhe devi kurvācamanamambike|
nirantaramahaṃ vande caraṇau tava caṇḍike||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ ācamanīyaṃ jalaṃ samarpayāmi||
Kamarivallabhe Devi Kurvachamanamambike|
Nirantaramaham Vande Charanau Tava Chandike||
Achamaniyam Jalam Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-narikela-sama:
nārikelaṃ ca nāraṅgīṃ kaliṅgamañjiraṃ tvayā|
urvārukaṃ ca deveśi phalānyetāni gṛhyatām||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ nārikelaṃ samarpayāmi||
Narikelam Cha Narangim Kalingamanjiram Tvaya|
Urvarukam Cha Deveshi Phalanyetani Grihyatam||
Narikelam Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-tambula-samar:
elālavaṅgaṃ kastūrī karpūraiḥ puṣpavāsitām|
vīṭikāṃ mukhavāsārthaṃ samarpayāmi sureśvari||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi||
Elalavangam Kasturi Karpuraih Pushpavasitam|
Vitikam Mukhavasartham Samarpayami Sureshwari||
Tambulam Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-dakshina-mant:
pūjāphalasamṛddhayarthaṃ tavāgre svarṇamīśvarī|
sthāpitaṃ tena me prītā pūrṇān kuru manoratham||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ dakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi||
Pujaphalasamriddhayartham Tavagre Svarnamishwari|
Sthapitam Tena Me Prita Purnan Kuru Manoratham||
Dakshinam Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-pustaka-puja-:
namo devyai mahādevyai śivāyai satataṃ namaḥ|
namaḥ prakṛtyai bhadrāyai niyatāḥ praṇatāḥ smatām||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ pustakaṃ pūjayāmi||
Namo Devyai Mahadevyai Shivayai Satatam Namah|
Namah Prakrityai Bhadrayai Niyatah Pranatah Smatam||
Pustakam Pujayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-dipa-pujana-m:
śubhaṃ bhavatu kalyāṇamārogyaṃ puṣṭivarddhanam|
ātmatattvaprabodhāya dīpajyotirnamo'stu te||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ dīpaṃ pūjayāmi||
Shubham Bhavatu Kalyanamarogyam Pushtivardhanam|
Atmatattvaprabodhaya Dipajyotirnamoastu Te||
Dipam Pujayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-kanya-pujana-:
sarvasvarūpe! sarveśe sarvaśakti svarūpiṇī|
pūjāṃ gṛhāṇa kaumāri! jaganmātarnamo'stu te||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ kanyāṃ pūjayāmi||
Sarvasvarupe! Sarveshe Sarvashakti Svarupini|
Pujam Grihana Kaumari! Jaganmatarnamoastu Te||
Kanyam Pujayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-nirajana-mant:
nīrājanaṃ sumāṅgalyaṃ karpūreṇa samanvitam|
candrārkavahnisadṛśaṃ mahādevi! namo'stu te||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ karpūranīrājanaṃ samarpayāmi||
Nirajanam Sumangalyam Karpurena Samanvitam|
Chandrarkavahnisadrisham Mahadevi! Namoastu Te||
Karpuranirajanam Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-pradakshina-m:
pradakṣiṇaṃ trayaṃ devi prayatnena prakalpitam|
paśyādya pāvane devi ambikāyai namo'stu te||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ pradakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi||
Pradakshinam Trayam Devi Prayatnena Prakalpitam|
Pashyadya Pavane Devi Ambikayai Namoastu Te||
Pradakshinam Samarpayami||
mantra:navratri:shri-durga-kshamarpana-m:
aparādhaśataṃ devi matkṛtaṃ ca dine dine|
kṣamyatāṃ pāvane devi deveśi namo'stu te||
oṃ bhūrbhuvaḥ svaḥ durgādevyai namaḥ aparādhān kṣamasva||
Aparadhashatam Devi Matkritam Cha Dine Dine|
Kshamyatam Pavane Devi Deveshi Namoastu Te||
Aparadhan Kshamaswa||
mantra:navratri:maa-kalaratri-avahan-man: oṃ aiṃ hrīṃ klīṃ cāmuṇḍāyai vicce
mantra:navratri:maa-kalaratri-dhyana-man:
ekaveṇī japākarṇapūrā nagnā kharāsthitā|
lamboṣṭhī karṇikākaṇī tailaabhyaktaśarīriṇī||
vāmapādollasalloha latākaṇṭakabhūṣaṇā|
vardhana mūrdhadhvajā kṛṣṇā kālarātrirbhayaṅkarī||
mantra:navratri:maa-mahagauri-mantra:
śvete vṛṣesamārūḍhā śvetāmbaradharā śuciḥ|
mahāgaurī śubhaṃ dadyānmahādeva pramodadā||
mantra:navratri:maa-siddhidatri-mantra:
siddha gandharva yakṣādyairasurairamarairapi|
sevyamānā sadā bhūyāt siddhidā siddhidāyinī||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-dhyana-man:
komalākṣaṃ viśālākṣamindranīlasamaprabham|
dakṣiṇāṅge daśarathaṃ putrāvekṣaṇatatparam||
pṛṣṭhato lakṣmaṇaṃ devaṃ sacchatraṃ kanakaprabham|
pārśve bharataśatrughnau tālavṛntakarāvubhau|
agre vyagraṃ hanūmantaṃ rāmānugrahakāṅkṣiṇaṃ||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| dhyānāt dhyānaṃ samarpayāmi||
Komalaksham Vishalakshamindranila Samaprabham|
Dakshinange Dasharatham Putravekshanatatparam||
Prishthato Lakshmanam Devam Sachchhatram Kanakaprabham|
Parshve Bharata Shatrughnau Talavrintakaravubhau|
Agre Vyagram Hanumantam Ramanugraha Kankshinam||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah|
Dhyanat Dhyanam Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-avahana-ma:
oṃ sahasraśīrṣā puruṣaḥ sahasrākṣaḥ sahasrapāt|
sa bhūmiṃ viśvato vṛtvā atyatiṣṭhaddaśāṅgulam||
āvāhayāmi viśveśaṃ jānakīvallabhaṃ prabhum|
kauśalyātanayaṃ viṣṇuṃ śrīrāmaṃ prakṛteḥ param||
śrīsītāsahita-śrīrāmacandraṃ sāṅgaṃ
saparivāraṃ sāyudhaṃ saśaktikam āvāhayāmi||
Om Sahasrashirsha Purushah Sahasrakshah Sahasrapat|
Sa Bhumim Vishvato Vritva Atyatishthaddashangulam||
Avahayami Vishvesham Janakivallabham Prabhum|
Kaushalyatanayam Vishnum Shriramam Prakriteh Param||
Saparivaram Sayudham Sashaktikam Avahayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-asana-mant:
puruṣa evedagaṃ sarvam yadbhūtaṃ yaccha bhavyam|
utāmṛtatvasyeśānaḥ yadannenātirohati||
rājādhirāja rājendra rāmacandra mahīpate|
ratnasiṃhāsanaṃ tubhyaṃ dāsyāmi svīkuru prabho||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| āsanaṃ samarpayāmi||
Purusha Evedagam Sarvam Yadbhutam Yachchha Bhavyam|
Utamritatvasyeshanah Yadannenatirohati||
Rajadhiraja Rajendra Ramachandra Mahipate|
Ratnasimhasanam Tubhyam Dasyami Svikuru Prabho||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah| Asanam Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-padya-mant:
etāvānasya mahimā ato jyāyāgaṃśca pūruṣaḥ|
pādo'sya viśvā bhūtāni tripādasyāmṛtaṃ divi||
trailokyapāvanānanta namaste raghunāyaka|
pādyaṃ gṛhāṇa rājarṣe namo rājīvalocana||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| pādayoḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi||
Etavanasya Mahima Ato Jyayagamshcha Purushah|
Padoasya Vishva Bhutani Tripadasyamritam Divi||
Trailokyapavanananta Namaste Raghunayaka|
Padyam Grihana Rajarshe Namo Rajivalochana||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah|
Padayoh Padyam Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-arghya-man:
tripādūrdhva udaitpuruṣaḥ pādo'syehābhavātpunaḥ|
tato viśvaṅvyakrāmat sāśanānaśane abhi||
paripūrṇa parānanda namo rāmāya vedhase|
gṛhāṇārghyaṃ mayā dattaṃ kṛṣṇa viṣṇo janārdana||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| arghyaṃ samarpayāmi||
Tripadurdhva Udaitpurushah Padoasyehabhavatpunah|
Tato Vishvanvyakramat Sashananashane Abhi||
Paripurna Parananda Namo Ramaya Vedhase|
Grihanarghyam Maya Dattam Krishna Vishno Janardana||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah|
Arghyam Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-achamaniya:
tasmādvirāḍajāyata virājo adhi pūruṣaḥ|
sa jāto atyaricyata paścādbhūmimatho puraḥ||
namaḥ satyāya śuddhāya nityāya jñānarūpiṇe|
gṛhāṇācamanaṃ rāma sarvalokaikanāyaka||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| ācamanīyaṃ samarpayāmi||
Tasmadviradajayata Virajo Adhi Purushah|
Sa Jato Atyarichyata Pashchadbhumimatho Purah||
Namah Satyaya Shuddhaya Nityaya Jnanarupine|
Grihanachamanam Rama Sarva Lokaika Nayaka||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah|
Achamaniyam Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-madhuparka:
namaḥ śrīvāmadevāya tattvajñānasvarūpiṇe|
madhuparkaṃ gṛhāṇedaṃ jānakīpataye namaḥ||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| madhuparkaṃ samarpayāmi||
Namah Shri Vamadevaya Tattvajnana Svarupine|
Madhuparkam Grihanedam Janakipataye Namah||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah|
Madhuparkam Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-snana-mant:
yatpuruṣeṇa haviṣā devā yajñamatanvata|
vasanto asyāsīdājyam grīṣma idhmaśśaraddhaviḥ||
brahmāṇḍodaramadhyasthaistīrthaiśca raghunandana|
snāpayiṣyāmyahaṃ bhaktyā tvaṃ prasīda janārdana||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| snānaṃ samarpayāmi||
Yatpurushena Havisha Deva Yajnamatanvata|
Vasanto Asyasidajyam Grishma Idhmashsharaddhavih||
Brahmandodara Madhyasthaistirthaishcha Raghunandana|
Snapayishyamyaham Bhaktya Tvam Prasida Janardana||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah| Snanam Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-panchamrit:
pañcāmṛtaṃ mayānītaṃ payo dadhi ghṛtaṃ madhu|
śarkarā ceti tadbhaktyā dattaṃ te pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| pañcāmṛtasnānaṃ samarpayāmi||
Panchamritam Mayanitam Payo Dadhi Ghritam Madhu|
Sharkara Cheti Tadbhaktya Dattam Te Pratigrihyatam||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah|
Panchamrita Snanam Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-vastra-man:
taṃ yajñaṃ barhiṣi praukṣan puruṣaṃ jātamagrataḥ|
tena devā ayajanta sādhyā ṛṣayaśca ye||
oṃ upaitu māṃ devasakhaḥ kīrtiśca maṇinā saha|
prādurbhūto'smi rāṣṭresminkīrtimṛddhiṃ dadātu me||
taptakāñcanasaṃkāśaṃ pītāmbaram idaṃ hare|
tvaṃ gṛhāṇa jagannātha rāmacandra namo'stu te||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| vastraṃ samarpayāmi||
Tam Yajnam Barhishi Praukshan Purusham Jatamagratah|
Tena Deva Ayajanta Sadhya Rishayashcha Ye||
Om Upaitu Mam Devasakhah Kirtishcha Manina Saha|
Pradurbhutoasmi Rashtresminkirtimriddhim Dadatu Me||
Tapta Kanchana Samkasham Pitambaram Idam Hare|
Tvam Grihana Jagannatha Ramachandra Namoastu Te||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah|
Vastram Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-yajnopavit:
tasmādyajñātsarvahutaḥ saṃbhṛtaṃ pṛṣadājyam|
paśūga~stāgaṃścakre vāyavyān āraṇyān grāmyāśca ye||
kṣutpipāsāmalāṃ jyeṣṭhāmalakṣmīṃ nāśayāmyaham|
abhūtimasamṛddhiṃ ca sarvāṃ nirṇuda me gṛhāt||
śrī rāmācyuta yajñeśa śrīdharānanta rāghava|
brahmasūtraṃ sottarīyaṃ gṛhāṇa raghunandana||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| yajñopavītaṃ samarpayāmi||
Tasmadyajnatsarvahutah Sambhritam Prishadajyam|
Pashuganstaganshchakre Vayavyan Aranyan Gramyashcha Ye||
Kshutpipasamalam Jyeshthamalakshmim Nashayamyaham|
Abhutimasamriddhim Cha Sarvam Nirnuda Me Grihat||
Shri Ramachyuta Yajnesha Shridharananta Raghava|
Brahmasutram Sottariyam Grihana Raghunandana||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah|
Yajnopavitam Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-gandha-man:
tasmādyajñātsarvahutaḥ ṛcaḥ sāmāni jajñire|
chandā~si jajñire tasmāt yajustasmādajāyata||
gandhadvārāṃ durādharṣāṃ nityapuṣṭāṃ karīṣiṇīm|
īśvarīṃ sarvabhūtānāṃ tāmihopahvaye śriyam||
kuṃkumāguru kastūrī karpūronmiśracandanam|
tubhyaṃ dāsyāmi rājendra śrīrāma svīkuru prabho||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| gandhaṃ samarpayāmi||
Tasmadyajnatsarvahutah Richah Samani Jajnire|
Chhandansi Jajnire Tasmat Yajustasmadajayata||
Gandhadwaram Duradharsham Nityapushtam Karishinim|
Ishwarim Sarvabhutanam Tamihopahvaye Shriyam||
Kumkumaguru Kasturi Karpuronmishrachandanam|
Tubhyam Dasyami Rajendra Shri Rama Svikuru Prabho||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah|
Gandham Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-pushpani-m:
tasmādaśvā ajāyanta ye ke cobhayādataḥ|
gāvo ha jajñire tasmāt tasmājjātā ajāvayaḥ||
tulasīkundamandārajātipunnāgacampakaiḥ|
kadambakaravīraiśca kusumaiḥ śatapatrakaiḥ||
nīlāmbujairbilvapatraiḥ puṣpamālyaiśca rāghava|
pūjayiṣyāmyahaṃ bhaktyā gṛhāṇa tvaṃ janārdana||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| puṣpāṇi samarpayāmi||
Tasmadashva Ajayanta Ye Ke Chobhayadatah|
Gavo Ha Jajnire Tasmat Tasmajjata Ajavayah||
Tulasi Kunda Mandara Jati Punnaga Champakaih|
Kadamba Karaviraishcha Kusumaih Shatapatrakaih||
Nilambujairbilvapatraih Pushpamalyaishcha Raghava|
Pujayishyamyaham Bhaktya Grihana Tvam Janardana||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah|
Pushpani Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-anga-puja-:
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| pādau pūjayāmi||
oṃ rājīvalocanāya namaḥ| gulphau pūjayāmi||
oṃ rāvaṇāntakāya namaḥ| jānunī pūjayāmi||
oṃ vācaspataye namaḥ| ūrū pūjayāmi||
oṃ viśvarūpāya namaḥ| jaṅghe pūjayāmi||
oṃ lakṣmaṇāgrajāya namaḥ| kaṭī pūjayāmi||
oṃ viśvamūrtaye namaḥ| meḍhraṃ pūjayāmi||
oṃ viśvāmitrapriyāya namaḥ| nābhiṃ pūjayāmi||
oṃ paramātmane namaḥ| hṛdayaṃ pūjayāmi||
oṃ śrīkaṇṭhāya namaḥ| kaṇṭhaṃ pūjayāmi||
oṃ sarvāstradhāriṇe namaḥ| bāhū pūjayāmi||
oṃ raghūdvahāya namaḥ| mukhaṃ pūjayāmi||
oṃ padmanābhāya namaḥ| jihvāṃ pūjayāmi||
oṃ dāmodarāya namaḥ| dantān pūjayāmi||
oṃ sītāpataye namaḥ| lalāṭaṃ pūjayāmi||
oṃ jñānagamyāya namaḥ| śiraḥ pūjayāmi||
oṃ sarvātmane namaḥ| sarvāṅgaṃ pūjayāmi||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| sarvāṅgāṇi pūjayāmi||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-dhupam-man:
vanaspatirasodbhūto gandhāḍhyo gandha uttamaḥ|
rāmacandra mahipālo dhūpo'yaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
yatpuruṣaṃ vyadadhuḥ katidhā vyakalpayan|
mukhaṃ kimasya kau bāhū kāvūrū pādāvucyete||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| dhūpaṃ āghrāpayāmi||
Vanaspatirasodbhuto Gandhadhyo Gandha Uttamah|
Ramachandra Mahipalo Dhupoayam Pratigrihyatam||
Yatpurusham Vyadadhuh Katidha Vyakalpayan|
Mukham Kimasya Kau Bahu Kavuru Padavuchyete||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah| Dhupam Aghrapayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-deepam-man:
sājyaṃ trivartisaṃyuktaṃ vahninā yojitaṃ mayā|
gṛhāṇa maṅgalaṃ dīpaṃ trailokyatimirāpaham||
jyotiṣāṃ pataye tubhyaṃ namo rāmāya vedhase|
gṛhāṇa dīpakaṃ caiva trailokyatimirāpaham||
brāhmaṇosya mukhamāsīt bāhū rājanyaḥ kṛtaḥ|
ūrū tadasya yadvaiśyaḥ padbhyāṃ śūdro'jāyata||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| dīpaṃ darśayāmi||
Sajyam Trivarti Samyuktam Vahnina Yojitam Maya|
Grihana Mangalam Deepam Trailokya Timirapaham||
Jyotisham Pataye Tubhyam Namo Ramaya Vedhase|
Grihana Deepakam Chaiva Trailokya Timirapaham||
Brahmanosya Mukhamasit Bahu Rajanyah Kritah|
Uru Tadasya Yadvaishyah Padbhyam Shudro Ajayata||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah| Deepam Darshayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-naivedya-m:
idaṃ divyānnamamṛtaṃ rasaiḥ ṣaḍbhiḥ samanvitam|
rāmacandreśa naivedyaṃ sīteśa pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ candramā manaso jātaḥ cakṣoḥ sūryo ajāyata|
mukhādindraścāgniśca prāṇādvāyurajāyata||
oṃ ārdrāṃ puṣkariṇīṃ puṣṭiṃ piṅgalāṃ padmamālinīṃ|
candrāṃ hiraṇmayīṃ lakṣmīṃ jātavedo ma āvaha||
oṃ namo rāmacandrāya|
śrījānakī-sahita-rāmacandrāya namaḥ| naivedyaṃ samarpayāmi||
naivedyānte ācamanīyaṃ jalaṃ samarpayāmi||
Idam Divyannamamritam Rasaih Shadbhih Samanvitam|
Ramachandresha Naivedyam Sitesha Pratigrihyatam||
Om Chandrama Manaso Jatah Chakshoh Suryo Ajayata|
Mukhadindrashchagnishcha Pranadvayurajayata||
Om Ardram Pushkarinim Pushtim Pingalam Padmamalinim|
Chandram Hiranmayim Lakshmim Jatavedo Ma Avaha||
Om Namo Ramachandraya|
Shri Janaki Sahita Ramachandraya Namah|
Naivedyam Samarpayami||
Naivedyante Achamaniyam Jalam Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-phala-mant:
idaṃ phalaṃ mayā deva sthāpitaṃ puratastava|
tena me saphalāvāptirbhavet janmani janmani||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| phalaṃ samarpayāmi||
Idam Phalam Maya Deva Sthapitam Puratastava|
Tena Me Saphalavaptirbhavet Janmani Janmani||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah| Phalam Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-tambula-ma:
nāgavallīdalairyuktaṃ pūgīphalasamanvitam|
tāmbūlaṃ gṛhyatāṃ rāma karpūrādisamanvitam||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| pūgīphalasamanvitaṃ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi||
Nagavallidalairyuktam Pugiphalasamanvitam|
Tambulam Grihyatam Rama Karpuradisamanvitam||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah|
Pugiphalasamanvitam Tambulam Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-dakshina-m:
hiraṇyagarbhagarbhasthaṃ hemabījaṃ vibhāvasoḥ|
anantapuṇyaphaladamataḥ śāntiṃ prayaccha me||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| dakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi||
Hiranya Garbha Garbhastham Hemabijam Vibhavasoh|
Ananta Punya Phaladam Atah Shantim Prayachchha Me||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah|
Dakshinam Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-nirajana-m:
nṛtyairgītaiśca vādyaiśca purāṇapaṭhanādibhiḥ|
pujopacārairakhilaiḥ santuṣṭo bhava rāghava||
maṅgalārthaṃ mahīpāla nīrājanamidaṃ hare|
saṃgṛhāṇa jagannātha rāmacandra namo'stu te||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| nīrājanaṃ samarpayāmi||
Nrityairgitaishcha Vadyaishcha Puranapathanadibhih|
Pujopacharairakhilaih Santushto Bhava Raghava||
Mangalartham Mahipala Nirajanamidam Hare|
Samgrihana Jagannatha Ramachandra Namoastu Te||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah|
Nirajanam Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-mantra-pus:
yajñena yajñamayajanta devāḥ tāni dharmāṇi prathamānyāsan|
te ha nākam mahimānaḥ sacante yatra pūrve sādhyāḥ santi devāḥ||
namo devādhidevāya raghunāthāya śārṅgiṇe|
cinmayānantarūpāya sītāyāḥ pataye namaḥ||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| mantrapuṣpāñjaliṃ samarpayāmi||
Yajnena Yajnamayajanta Devah Tani Dharmani Prathamanyasan|
Te Ha Nakam Mahimanah Sachante Yatra Purve Sadhyah Santi Devah||
Namo Devadhidevaya Raghunathaya Sharngine|
Chinmayanantarupaya Sitayah Pataye Namah||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah|
Mantra Pushpanjalim Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-pradakshin:
nābhyā āsīdantarikṣam śīrṣṇo dyauḥ samavartata|
padbhyāṃ bhūmirdiśaḥ śrotrāt tathā lokā~ akalpayan||
ārdrāṃ yaḥkariṇīṃ puṣṭiṃ piṅgalāṃ padmamālinīm|
candrāṃ hiraṇmayīṃ lakṣmīṃ jātavedo ma āvaha||
yāni kāni ca pāpāni brahmahatyāsamāni ca|
tāni tāni vinaśyanti pradakṣiṇe pade pade||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| pradakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi||
Nabhya Asidantariksham Shirshno Dyauh Samavartata|
Padbhyam Bhumirdishah Shrotrat Tatha Lokan Akalpayan||
Ardram Yahkarinim Pushtim Pingalam Padmamalinim|
Chandram Hiranmayim Lakshmim Jatavedo Ma Avaha||
Yani Kani Cha Papani Brahmahatyasamani Cha|
Tani Tani Vinashyanti Pradakshine Pade Pade||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah|
Pradakshinam Samarpayami||
mantra:ram-navami:rama-navami-kshamarpan:
aparādhasahasrāṇi kriyante'harniśaṃ mayā|
dāso'yamiti māṃ matvā kṣamasva puruṣottama||
yāntu devagaṇāḥ sarve pūjām ādāya pārthivīm|
iṣṭakāmyārthasiddhyarthaṃ punarāgamanāya ca||
oṃ śrīrāmacandrāya namaḥ| kṣamārpaṇaṃ samarpayāmi||
Aparadha Sahasrani Kriyante Aharnisham Maya|
Dasoayamiti Mam Matva Kshamasva Purushottama||
Yantu Deva Ganah Sarve Pujam Adaya Parthivim|
Ishta Kamyartha Siddhyartham Punaragamanaya Cha||
Om Shri Ramachandraya Namah| Kshamarpanam Samarpayami||
mantra:rudrabhishek:maha-mrityunjaya-man:
oṃ tryambakaṃ yajāmahe sugandhiṃ puṣṭibardhanam |
urvārūkamiva bandhanān mṛtyormukṣīya mā mṛtāt ||
mantra:santan-gopal-mantra:santan-gopal-: oṃ śrīṃ hrīṃ klīṃ glauṃ devakīsuta govinda vāsudeva jagatpate dehi me tanayaṃ kṛṣṇa tvāmahaṃ śaraṇaṃ gataḥ |
mantra:santan-gopal-mantra:shri-krishna-: oṃ klīṃ gopālaveṣadharāya vāsudevāya huṃ phaṭa svāhā |
mantra:saraswati:saraswati-vidya-mantra:
sarasvati namastubhyaṃ varade kāmarūpiṇi |
|| vidyārambhaṃ kariṣyāmi siddhirbhavatu me sadā ||
mantra:saraswati:the-saraswati-mantra:
|| sarasvati mahābhāge vidye kamalalocane |
vidyārūpe viśālākṣi vidyāṃ dehi namostute||
mantra:saraswati:saraswati-dhyan-mantra:
oṃ sarasvatī mayā dṛṣṭvā, vīṇā pustaka dhāraṇīm |
haṃsa vāhinī samāyuktā māṃ vidyā dāna karotu meṃ oṃ ||
mantra:saraswati:saraswati-puranokta-man:
yā devī sarvabhūteṣu vidyā-rūpeṇa saṃsthitā,
namastasyai namastasyai namastasyai namo namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:saraswati-gaaytri-mantr:
‘oṃ vāgadaivyai ca vidmahe kāmarājāya dhīmahi|
tanno devī pracodayāt‌|’
mantra:saraswati:saraswati-vandana:
yā kundendutuṣārahāradhavalā yā śubhravastrāvṛtā
yā vīṇāvaradaṇḍamaṇḍitakarā yā śvetapadmāsanā||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-dhyana-m:
yā kundendutuṣārahāradhavalā yā śubhravastrāvṛtā|
yā vīṇāvaradaṇḍamaṇḍitakarā yā śvetapadmāsanā||
yā brahmācyutaśaṅkaraprabhṛtibhirdevaiḥ sadā vanditā|
sā māṃ pātu sarasvatī bhagavatī niḥśeṣajāḍyāpahā||
oṃ dhyānāt dhyānaṃ samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-avahana-:
hariḥ oṃ| sahasraśīrṣā puruṣaḥ sahasrākṣaḥ sahasrapāt|
sa bhūmiṃ viśvato vṛtvā atyatiṣṭhaddaśāṅgulam||
āgaccha sarasvatī devī sthāne cātra sthiro bhava|
yāvatpūjāṃ kariṣyāmi tāvattvaṃ sannidhau bhava||
oṃ bhagavatīṃ śrīsarasvatīm āvāhayāmi||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-asana-ma:
ramyaṃ suśobhanaṃ divyaṃ sarvasaukhyakaraṃ śubham|
āsanaṃ ca mayā dattaṃ gṛhāṇa parameśvari||
oṃ idamāsanaṃ samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-padya-ma:
gaṅgodakaṃ nirmalaṃ ca sarvasaugandhasaṃyutam|
pādaprakṣālanārthāya dattaṃ te pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ pādayoḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-arghya-m:
arghyaṃ gṛhāṇa deveśi gandhapuṣpākṣataiḥ saha|
karuṇāṃ kuru me devi gṛhāṇārghyaṃ namo'stu te||
oṃ hastayorarghyaṃ samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-achamani:
sarvatīrthasamāyuktaṃ sugandhinirmalaṃ jalam|
ācamyatāṃ mayā dattaṃ gṛhāṇa parameśvari||
oṃ mukhe ācamanīyaṃ samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-snana-ma:
gaṅgāsarasvatīrevā-payoṣṇīnarmadājalaiḥ|
snāpitā'si mayā devi tathā śāntiṃ kuruṣva me||
oṃ snānārthaṃ jalaṃ samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-panchamr:
payo dadhi ghṛtaṃ caiva madhu ca śarkarāyutam|
pañcāmṛtaṃ mayānītaṃ snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ pañcāmṛtena snāpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-shuddhod:
jñānamūrte bhadrakāli divyamūrte sureśvari|
śuddhasnānaṃ gṛhāṇedaṃ nārāyaṇi namo'stu te||
oṃ pañcāmṛtasya paścāt śuddhodakena snāpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-gandha-s:
malayācalasambhūtaṃ candanāgarusambhavam|
candanaṃ devadeveśi snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śuddhodakasya paścāt gandhodakena snāpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-vastra-m:
tantusantānasaṃyuktaṃ kalākauśalakalpitam|
sarvāṅgābharaṇaṃ śreṣṭhavasanaṃ paridhīyatām||
oṃ vastraṃ samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-chandana:
śrīkhaṇḍaṃ candanaṃ divyaṃ gandhāḍhyaṃ sumanoharam|
vilepanaṃ suraśreṣṭhe candanaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ candanaṃ samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-saubhagy:
tāmbūlapatraṃ mayā''nītaṃ haridrākuṅkumāñjanam|
sindūrālakcakaṃ dāsve saubhāgyadravyamīśvari||
oṃ saubhāgyadravyaṃ samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-alankara:
ratnakaṅkaṇakeyūraṃ kāñcī kuṇḍalanūpuraṃ|
muktāhāraṃ kirīṭañca gṛhāṇābharaṇāni me||
oṃ alaṅkārān samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-pushpa-m:
mālyādīni sugandhīni mālyatyādīni vai prabho|
mayā''nītāni puṣpāṇi gṛhāṇa parameśvari||
oṃ puṣpaṃ puṣpamālāṃ ca samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-dhupa-ma:
vanaspatirasodbhūto gandhāḍhyo gandha uttamaḥ|
āghreyaḥ nārāyaṇi dhūpo'yaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ dhūpamāghrāpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-deepa-ma:
sājyaṃ ca vartisaṃyuktaṃ vahninā yojitaṃ mayā|
dīpaṃ gṛhāṇa deveśi trailokyatimirāpaham||
oṃ dīpaṃ darśayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-naivedya:
śarkarāghṛtasaṃyuktaṃ madhuraṃ svādu cottamam|
upahārasamāyuktaṃ naivedyaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ naivedyaṃ nivedayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-achamani:
elośiralavaṅgādi-karpūraparivāsitam|
prāśanārthaṃ kṛtaṃ toyaṃ gṛhāṇa parameśvari||
oṃ naivedyānte ācamanīyaṃ samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-tambula-:
pūgīphalaṃ mahaddivyaṃ nāgavallīdalairyutam|
elācūrṇādisaṃyuktaṃ tāmbūlaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ elālavaṅgakarpūra-ādisahitaṃ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-dakshina:
hiraṇyagarbhagarbhasthaṃ hemabījaṃ vibhāvasoḥ|
anantapuṇyaphaladamataḥ śāntiṃ prayaccha me||
oṃ dakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-arartiky:
kadalīgarbhasambhūtaṃ karpūraṃ tu pradīpitam|
ārārtikyamahaṃ kurve paśya me varado bhava||
oṃ karpūrārārtikyaṃ samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-pradaksh:
ekā caṇḍyā raveḥ sapta tisraḥ kāryā vināyake|
hareścatasraḥ kartavyāḥ śivasyārdhapradakṣiṇā||
oṃ pradakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-pushpanj:
nānāsugandhapuṣpaiśca yathākālodbhavairapi|
puṣpāñjaliṃ mayā dattāṃ gṛhāṇa parameśvari||
oṃ mantrapuṣpāñjaliyuktaṃ namaskāraṃ samarpayāmi bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-sashtang:
namo devyai mahādevyai śivāyai satataṃ namaḥ|
namaḥ prakṛtyai bhadrāyai niyatāḥ praṇatāḥ sma tām||
tāmagnivarṇāṃ tapasā jvalantīṃ vairocanīṃ karmaphaleṣu juṣṭām|
durgāṃ devīgaṃ śaraṇamahaṃ prapadye sutarasi tarase namaḥ||
devīṃ vācamajanayanta devāstāṃ viśvarūpāḥ paśavo vadanti|
sā no mandreṣamūrjaṃ duhānā dhenurvāgasmānupasuṣṭutaitu||
kālarātriṃ brahmastutāṃ vaiṣṇavīṃ skandamātaram|
sarasvatīmaditiṃ dakṣaduhitaraṃ namāmaḥ pāvanāṃ śivām||
oṃ bhagavatyai śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ sāṣṭāṅga-praṇāmaṃ samarpayāmi||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-avahana-:
āgaccha devi deveśi! tejomayi sarasvati!
kriyamāṇāṃ mayā pūjāṃ gṛhāṇa sura-vandite!
|| śrīsarasvatī-devīm āvāhayāmi||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-pushpanj:
nānā-ratna-samāyuktaṃ kārtasvara-vibhūṣitam|
āsanaṃ devi deveśi! prītyarthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
|| śrīsarasvatī-devyai āsanārthe pañca-puṣpāṇi samarpayāmi||
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-nav-upch:
oṃ śrīsarasvatī-devyai namaḥ pādayoḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīsarasvatī-devyai namaḥ śirasi arghyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīsarasvatī-devyai namaḥ gandhākṣatān samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīsarasvatī-devyai namaḥ puṣpaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīsarasvatī-devyai namaḥ dhūpam āghrāpayāmi|
oṃ śrīsarasvatī-devyai namaḥ dīpaṃ darśayāmi|
oṃ śrīsarasvatī-devyai namaḥ naivedyaṃ nivedayāmi|
oṃ śrīsarasvatī-devyai namaḥ ācamanīyaṃ samarpayāmi|
oṃ śrīsarasvatī-devyai namaḥ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi|
mantra:saraswati:shri-saraswati-puja-sam:
oṃ śrīsarasvatyai namaḥ|
anena pūjanena śrīsarasvatī devī prīyatām|
namo namaḥ|
mantra:saraswati:saraswati-dhyana-mantra:
Ya Vina-Vara-Danda-Mandita-Kara, Ya Shveta-Padmasana||
Sa Mam Patu Saraswati Bhagawati Nihshesha-Jadyapaha||
mantra:saraswati:saraswati-pushpanjali-1:
Nana-Ratna-Samayuktam, Karta-Swara-Vibhushitam|
Asanam Deva-Deveshi! Prityartham Prati-Grihyatam||
||Shri Saraswati-Devyai Asnarthe Pancha-Pushpani Samarpayami||
mantra:saraswati:saraswati-pushpanjali-2:
Om Shri Saraswati-Devyai Namah Padayoh Padyam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Saraswati-Devyai Namah Shirasi Arghyam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Saraswati-Devyai Namah Gandhakshatam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Saraswati-Devyai Namah Pushpam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Saraswati-Devyai Namah Dhupam Ghrapayami|
Om Shri Saraswati-Devyai Namah Dipam Darshayami|
Om Shri Saraswati-Devyai Namah Naivedyam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Saraswati-Devyai Namah Achamaniyam Samarpayami|
Om Shri Saraswati-Devyai Namah Tambulam Samarpayami|
mantra:saraswati:saraswati-pushpanjali-3: Om Shri Saraswatyai Namah| Anena Pujanena Shri Saraswati Devi Priyatam| Namo Namah|
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-d:
dhyāyet satyaṃ guṇātītaṃ guṇatrayasamanvitam|
lokanāthaṃ trilokeśaṃ kaustubhābharaṇaṃ harim||
nīlavarṇaṃ pītavastraṃ śrīvatsapadabhūṣitam|
govindaṃ gokulānandaṃ brahmādyairapi pūjitam||
Dhyayet Satyam Gunatitam Gunatrayasamanvitam|
Lokanatham Trilokesham Kaustubhabharanam Harim||
Nilavarnam Pitavastram Shrivatsapadabhushitam|
Govindam Gokulanandam Brahmadyairapi Pujitam||
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-a:
dāmodara samāgaccha lakṣmyā saha jagatpate|
imāṃ mayā kṛtāṃ pūjāṃ gṛhāṇa surasattama||
oṃ śrīlakṣmī-sahita-śrīsatyanārāyaṇam āvāhayāmi|
Damodara Samagachchha Lakshmya Saha Jagatpate|
Imam Maya Kritam Pujam Grihana Surasattama||
Om Shri Lakshmi Sahita Shri Satyanarayanam Avahayami|

nānāratnasamākīrṇaṃ kārtasvaravibhūṣitam|
āsanaṃ devadeveśa! prītyarthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ āsanaṃ samarpayāmi|
Nanaratna Samakirnam Kartasvaravibhushitam|
Asanam Devadevesha! Prityartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Asanam Samarpayami|
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-p:
nārāyaṇaḥ namaste'stu narakārṇavatāraka|
pādyaṃ gṛhāṇa deveśa! mama saukhyaṃ vivardhaya||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ pādayoḥ pādyaṃ samarpayāmi|
Narayanah Namasteastu Narakarnavataraka|
Padyam Grihana Devesha! Mama Saukhyam Vivardhaya||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Padayoh Padyam Samarpayami|
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-a:
vyaktāvyaktasvarūpāya hṛṣīkapataye namaḥ|
mayā nivedito bhaktyā arghyo'yaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ arghyaṃ samarpayāmi|
Vyaktavyaktasvarupaya Hrishikapataye Namah|
Maya Nivedito Bhaktya Arghyoayam Pratigrihyatam||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Arghyam Samarpayami|

mandākinyāstu yadvāri sarvapāpaharaṃ śubham|
tadidaṃ kalpitaṃ deva samyagācamyatāṃ vibho||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ ācamanīyaṃ samarpayāmi|
Mandakinyastu Yadvari Sarvapapa Haram Shubham|
Tadidam Kalpitam Deva Samyagachamyatam Vibho||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Achamaniyam Samarpayami|
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-p:
snānaṃ pañcāmṛtairdeva gṛhāṇa surasattama|
anāthanāthasarvajña gīrvāṇapraṇatapriya||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ pañcāmṛtasnānaṃ samarpayāmi|
Snanam Panchamritairdeva Grihana Surasattama|
Anathanatha Sarvajna Girvana Pranatapriya||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Panchamrita Snanam Samarpayami|
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-s:
nānātīrthasamānītaṃ sarvapāpaharaṃ śubham|
tadidaṃ kalpitaṃ deva snānārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ śuddhodakasnānaṃ samarpayāmi|
Nanatirthasamanitam Sarvapapa Haram Shubham|
Tadidam Kalpitam Deva Snanartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Shuddhodaka Snanam Samarpayami|
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-v:
śītavātoṣṇasaṃtrāṇaṃ lajjāyāḥ rakṣaṇaṃ param|
dehālaṅkaraṇaṃ vastraṃ prītyarthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ vastrayugmaṃ samarpayāmi|
Shitavatoshna Samtranam Lajjayah Rakshanam Param|
Dehalankaranam Vastram Prityartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Vastra Yugmam Samarpayami|
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-y:
brahmāviṣṇumaheśena nirmitaṃ sūtramuttamam|
gṛhāṇa bhagavan viṣṇo sarveṣṭaphalado bhava||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ yajñopavītaṃ samarpayāmi|
Brahmavishnumaheshena Nirmitam Sutramuttamam|
Grihana Bhagawan Vishno Sarveshta Phalado Bhava||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Yajnopavitam Samarpayami|
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-c:
śrīkhaṇḍaṃ candanaṃ divyaṃ gandhāḍhyaṃ sumanoharam|
vilepanaṃ suraśreṣṭha candanaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ candanaṃ samarpayāmi|
Shrikhandam Chandanam Divyam Gandhadhyam Sumanoharam|
Vilepanam Surashreshtha Chandanam Pratigrihyatam||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Chandanam Samarpayami|
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-p:
mālyādīni sugandhīni mālatyādīni vai prabho|
mayā hṛtāni puṣpāṇi pūjārthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ puṣpāṇi samarpayāmi|
Malyadini Sugandhini Malatyadini Vai Prabho|
Maya Hritani Pushpani Pujartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Pushpani Samarpayami|
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-d:
vanaspatirasodbhūto gandhāḍhyo gandha uttamaḥ|
āghreyaḥ sarvadevānāṃ dhūpo'yaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ dhūpam āghrāpayāmi|
Vanaspatirasodbhuto Gandhadhyo Gandha Uttamah|
Aghreyah Sarvadevanam Dhupoayam Pratigrihyatam||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Dhupam Aghrapayami|

sājyaṃ ca vartisaṃyuktaṃ vahninā dīpitaṃ mayā|
dīpaṃ gṛhāṇa deveśa mama saukhyaprado bhava||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ dīpaṃ darśayāmi|
Sajyam Cha Varti Samyuktam Vahnina Deepitam Maya|
Deepam Grihana Devesha Mama Saukhyaprado Bhava||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Deepam Darshayami|
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-n:
ghṛtapakvaṃ haviṣyānnaṃ pāyasaṃ ca saśarkaram|
nānāvidhaṃ ca naivedyaṃ gṛhṇīṣva surasattama||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ naivedyaṃ nivedayāmi|
Ghritapakvam Havishyannam Payasam Cha Sasharkaram|
Nanavidham Cha Naivedyam Grihnishva Surasattama||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Naivedyam Nivedayami|
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-t:
lavaṅgakarpūrasaṃyuktaṃ tāmbūlaṃ surapūjitam|
elādicūrṇasaṃyuktaṃ prītyarthaṃ pratigṛhyatām||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ tāmbūlaṃ samarpayāmi|
Lavangakarpurasamyuktam Tambulam Sura Pujitam|
Eladichurna Samyuktam Prityartham Pratigrihyatam||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Tambulam Samarpayami|
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-p:
idaṃ phalaṃ mayā deva! sthāpitaṃ puratastava|
tena me saphalāvāptirbhavejjanmani janmani||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ phalaṃ samarpayāmi|
Idam Phalam Maya Deva! Sthapitam Puratastava|
Tena Me Saphalavaptirbhavejjanmani Janmani||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Phalam Samarpayami|
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-a:
caturvartisamāyuktaṃ goghṛtena ca pūritam|
ārārtikyamahaṃ kurve paśya me varado bhava||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ maṅgala-ārārtikyaṃ samarpayāmi|
Chaturvarti Samayuktam Goghritena Cha Puritam|
Arartikyamaham Kurve Pashya Me Varado Bhava||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Mangala-Arartikyam Samarpayami|
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-p:
yāni kāni ca pāpāni janmāntarakṛtāni ca|
tāni tāni vinaśyantu pradakṣiṇapade pade||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ pradakṣiṇāṃ samarpayāmi|
Yani Kani Cha Papani Janmantara Kritani Cha|
Tani Tani Vinashyantu Pradakshina Pade Pade||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Pradakshinam Samarpayami|
mantra:satyanarayan:shri-satyanarayana-m:
yanmayā bhaktiyuktena patraṃ puṣpaṃ phalaṃ jalam|
niveditaṃ ca naivedyaṃ tadgṛhāṇānukampayā||
mantrahīnaṃ kriyāhīnaṃ bhaktihīnaṃ janārdana|
yatpūjitaṃ mayā deva paripūrṇaṃ tadastu me||
anayā pūjayā śrīviṣṇuḥ prasīdatu||
oṃ śrīsatyanārāyaṇāya namaḥ puṣpāñjaliṃ samarpayāmi|
Yanmaya Bhakti Yuktena Patram Pushpam Phalam Jalam|
Niveditam Cha Naivedyam Tad Grihananukampaya||
Mantrahinam Kriyahinam Bhaktihinam Janardana|
Yatpujitam Maya Deva Paripurnam Tadastu Me||
Anaya Pujaya Shrivishnuh Prasidatu||
Om Shri Satyanarayanaya Namah Pushpanjalim Samarpayami|
